ENDRO is a modern movement clinic built around one idea: your body should work for you, not against you. We combine hands-on care, performance rehab, and individualized movement programming to help athletes and active people move better, recover faster, and stay durable long-term. We're growing fast — and we need someone sharp to help keep things running behind the scenes.



The Role

We're looking for a highly organized, proactive Virtual Assistant who can handle day-to-day operations and step up as an Executive Assistant to the clinic's leadership. This is not a "sit and wait for tasks" role. You'll anticipate needs, take ownership of your responsibilities, and communicate clearly without being chased.

Manage CEO calendars, schedule appointments, and protect their time

Draft and respond to
s on behalf of leadership

Coordinate with tea
mbers and external contacts

Create and manage documents, SOPs, and spreadsheets

Handle miscellaneous tasks and projects as they come up





What We're Looking For



Proven VA or EA experience — at least 1–2 years, preferably supporting executives or founders

Excellent written English — clear, professional, no fluff

Highly responsive and reliable — we move fast and expect the same

Tech-savvy: comfortable with Google Workspace, scheduling tools, CRMs, and project management apps

Discreet and trustworthy with sensitive business information

Self-starter who doesn't need hand-holding

Healthcare or wellness industry experience is a plus, not required





What We Offer



Fully remote, flexible working arrangement

A growing company with a real mission

Direct access and visibility to leadership

Room to grow with the business





How to Apply

Send a short intro (no longer than a paragraph), your resume, and any relevant experience to [hiring
]. If you've supported executives before, mention it — that gets priority.

title: GeoAnalytics / Analytics Technician
description:
GeoAnalytics / Analytics Technician 



 



Position Summary 



We are seeking a GeoAnalytics / Analytics Technician to support subsurface data workflows, automation, and analytics infrastructure. This role blends traditional geoscience technical support with hands-on scripting and database work. 



The ideal candidate is a technically strong geotechnician or analyst who understands oil & gas datasets and can independently manage small-to-medium coding tasks that streamline workflows and maintain data pipelines. 



This is not a data science or machine learning role. The focus is practical automation, database support, and connecting systems efficiently. 



 



Key Responsibilities 



Develop and maintain Python scripts to automate data workflows 



Write and maintain SQL queries and support relational database structure (RDS) 



Assist in database design, maintenance, and optimization 



Build and maintain ETL pipelines from third-party sources (e.g., ZoneVu, Corva, IHS, others) 



Work with RESTful web APIs to extract and move data between systems 



Clean, validate, and standardize oil & gas datasets (well data, directional surveys, production data) 



Support GIS data handling (file types, CRS conversions, projections) 



Create and maintain dashboards and data visualizations 



Troubleshoot data issues and maintain data integrity across platforms 



 



Required Qualifications 



Proficiency in Python 



Proficiency in SQL (beyond basic querying) 



Understanding of RESTful APIs and ETL processes 



Experience with relational databases and RDS environments 



Working knowledge of oil & gas data structures 



GIS fundamentals 



Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work independently 



 



Preferred Qualifications 



Familiarity with geologic data (logs, formation tops) 



Basic geologic understanding (stratigraphy, structural concepts) 



Azure or cloud data environment experience 



Spotfire or Power BI experience 



 



Ideal Candidate 



A geotechnician or analyst who can code, understands subsurface data, and enjoys improving workflows by connecting systems and automating repetitive tasks.

title: Full-Stack Web Developer (Next.js + Supabase) – Build SaaS App (ServiceLog)
description:
Job Title



Full-Stack Web Developer (Next.js + Supabase) – Build SaaS App (ServiceLog)



???? Job Overview



We are building a web-based application called *ServiceLog, a platform that allows users to log  service time on app or website and generate official tracking forms off the website.



We are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented full-stack developer to build the MVP (minimum viable product) from the ground up.



This is a structured project with clear phases, not an open-ended “figure it out” job.



???? What You’ll Be Building

A web app where users can:



Sign up and log in

Add and manage vehicles

Log service trips (date, hours, waters, etc.)

Automatically calculate qualifying service days

Generate a completed tracking form per vehicle

Download and print that form



???? Tech Stack (Required)

You must be comfortable with:



Next.js (React, App Router, TypeScript)

Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth + RLS)

Vercel (deployment)

PDF generation (pdf-lib or similar)



???? Scope of Work (MVP)

You will build:



Phase 1 – App Structure

Next.js project setup

Page routing and layout

Clean, responsive UI



Phase 2 – Authentication

Supabase signup/login/logout

Protected routes

Secure user sessions



Phase 3 – Database + Core Features

Vessel management (CRUD)

Service log entry system

Data validation and structure



Phase 4 – Business Logic

Service time calculation:

4+ hours per day = 1 qualifying day

Dashboard totals:

total days

last 90 days

last 3 years



Phase 5 – PDF Generation

Load service template

Map user data to PDF fields

Generate downloadable/printable form



???? Expectations

We are looking for someone who:



Writes clean, structured, maintainable code

Follows instructions and build phases exactly

Does NOT over-engineer or add unnecessary tools

Communicates clearly and consistently

Tests their own work before submitting

Documents key logic and decisions



You must:



Work inside our GitHub repo

Use our Supabase and Vercel accounts

Commit code regularly

Provide clear updates per milestone

?? Important Rules

Do not rewrite unrelated files

Do not introduce new frameworks without approval

Do not use placeholder/mock logic in final code

Do not skip validation or security practices



???? Ownership & Legal 

This project will require:



1. Work-for-Hire Agreement

All work created will be 100% owned by us, including:

source code

database structure

UI/UX

documentation



2. Confidentiality (NDA)

You agree not to:

share, reuse, or distribute any part of this project

use this codebase for other clients or projects



3. Account Control

All development will be done using:

our GitHub

our Supabase

our Vercel



No work should be built under personal accounts.



???? Payment Structure

Milestone-based payments:

Milestone 1: App structure complete

Milestone 2: Authentication working

Milestone 3: Vessel + logs working

Milestone 4: Calculations + dashboard

Milestone 5: PDF generation complete



???? Tools You Will Use

GitHub (version control)

Supabase (backend)

Vercel (hosting)

Cursor (optional, for AI-assisted coding)



???? How to Apply

Must include each of the six points below:

1. Examples of previous work (links required)

2. State your Experience with:

           Next.js

           Supabase

           PDF generation

3. A short explanation of how you would approach this project INCLUDING an explanation of how you would generate a PDF from dynamic data in a web app.

4. Confirmation that you are comfortable signing an NDA and work-for-hire agreement.

5. Your total fixed price for the full project

         Breakdown of cost by milestone:

             Milestone 1: App structure complete

             Milestone 2: Authentication working

             Milestone 3: Vessel + logs working

             Milestone 4: Calculations + dashboard

             Milestone 5: PDF generation complete

6. Estimated timeline (in days or weeks) 



???? Bonus 

Experience with SaaS apps

Experience with form generation or document automation

Strong UI/UX sense

Familiarity with  logging systems (not required)



???? Final Note

This is a structured build with clear direction. We are looking for someone who can execute efficiently and communicate well.

If you’re organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable building real products, not just prototypes, you’ll be a great fit!



Look forward to hearing from you!



Dee

I’m hiring a Dispositions Manager who can move assignment deals quickly and build the relationships that keep our dispo pipeline full. You’ll be responsible for dispo’ing our contracted deals to vetted cash buyers, building and maintaining a real buyers list (not tire-kickers), and growing a JV/wholesaler network so we can collaborate and increase deal flow nationwide.



If you can take a deal, package it cleanly, lock a buyer with proof of funds and earnest money, and push it to title without drama, you’ll do well here.



What You’ll Be Doing:



1. Dispositions (start to finish)



* Build clean deal packets (details, comps summary, photos, access plan, terms)

* Market deals to the buyer list and approved channels; handle buyer calls/texts

* Negotiate terms, secure commitment, collect proof of funds and earnest money, and drive the file to close

* Coordinate access/showings and manage buyer deadlines

* Keep the dispo pipeline updated in the CRM (status, tasks, tags, notes) and send weekly reporting



2. Help Build and Pre-Vet a Cash Buyers List



* Grow a nationwide buyers list aligned with buy boxes (areas, price bands, property types)

* Pre-vet buyers (proof of funds, close speed, preferred title process, reliability)

* Track buyer performance (close rate, retrades, responsiveness) so we sell to the right people



3. JV + Wholesaler Relationships (Deal Flow Growth)



* Build relationships with wholesalers and investor operators across the US

* Source JV opportunities, evaluate incoming deals quickly, and coordinate collaboration

* Help position ResolvedRES as a preferred JV partner and buyer



Tools You Should Be Comfortable With:



* CRM pipelines (tasks, tags, ownership, follow-ups, reporting) - RESimpli, InvestorLift, CREATIVE REI Reply, or similar tools

* Google Sheets/Excel (buyer list + dispo tracker)

* E-sign/contract templates (assignment agreements)

* Phone/SMS workflows and call tracking (preferred)



How You’ll Be Measured:



* Days-to-dispo (contracted to assigned)

* Assignment closes per month

* Fallout rate (buyers who commit but don’t close)

* Buyer list growth and buyer quality (proof of funds compliance, close rate, responsiveness)

* CRM hygiene and weekly reporting consistency



What We’re Looking For (Credibility Filters):

You should have real dispositions experience with wholesale/assignment deals, or be able to prove you’ve done equivalent work at a high level.



You’ll stand out if you can share (redacted is fine):



* Buyer list structure + your vetting process

* Deal tracker/pipeline report

* Sample deal packet

* Call recordings showing buyer negotiation and follow-up



To Apply (Required)

Please submit:



1. CV/Resume

2. Video introduction (1–2 minutes): your dispo background + how you typically move a deal to close

3. Sample call recordings (if available) (buyer negotiations/follow-ups; redact private info)

4. Optional: proof of results (KPIs/closed deals/dispo metrics — redacted)



Screening Questions (Answer in your application)



* How do you build and pre-vet buyers (buy box + proof of funds + close speed)?

* How do you prevent retrades and reduce fallout after a buyer commits?

* What’s your typical days-to-dispo, and what do you do when a deal is stale?

* What CRM/dialer/e-sign tools have you used?



If you need to share files, links, or reference documents, you can reach me directly at:

title: Software Engineer
description:
Software Engineer - Ally Logistics



ABOUT ALLY LOGISTICS:

Ally Logistics is a U.S.-based third-party logistics (3PL) company headquartered in Grand Rapids, Michigan. Since 2012, we’ve been committed to creating the ultimate freight shipping experience by operating at the optimal intersection of people and technology.



As a full-service 3PL, we specialize in a wide range of freight solutions, including dry van, refrigerated, drayage, straight truck, open deck/flatbed, drop-trailer programs, warehousing, and more. Our diverse service capabilities allow us to support shippers across industries with flexible, reliable, and scalable logistics strategies.

We partner with skilled global talent to support our continued growth and operational excellence, ensuring our customers receive efficient, high-quality service at every step of the supply chain.



About the Role

We're looking for a software engineer who ships fast using AI-assisted development tools — Claude Code, Cursor, Replit, or similar. You don't just use these tools casually; they're core to how you work. You move through large codebases confidently, write production-quality code at high velocity, and treat AI tooling as a multiplier rather than a crutch.



This is a full-stack role. You'll work across our React frontend, Express API layer, and PostgreSQL schema — building features, fixing bugs, and extending a platform.



What You'll Do

  - Build and extend features across our freight and logistics platform for brokers, shippers, carriers, and providers

  - Work with quoting, load management, accounting, EDI, and integration systems

  - Write and maintain migrations, API routes, and React UI components

  - Ship complete features — schema to API to UI — independently

  - Collaborate asynchronously and move quickly with minimal handholding



What We're Looking For

  - Strong TypeScript/JavaScript across frontend and backend

  - Experience with React, Express (or similar Node frameworks), and relational databases

  - Daily, productive use of AI coding tools (Claude Code, Cursor, Replit Agent, Copilot, etc.) — we want to see that this is how you already work, not something you're willing to try

  - Comfort navigating and contributing to a large, real-world codebase (not just greenfield projects)

  - Familiarity with PostgreSQL, ORMs (Drizzle or similar), and writing migrations

  - Bias toward shipping over perfecting



Nice to Have

  - Freight, logistics, or supply chain domain experience

  - Experience with multi-tenant SaaS platforms

  - Familiarity with EDI, carrier compliance, or TMS integrations

  - Experience with Drizzle ORM specifically

  - Contributions to open source or public projects that demonstrate AI-assisted velocity



How to Stand Out

-Show us something you shipped fast with AI tools. A side project, a PR, a screen recording, a before/after — anything that demonstrates your workflow and velocity. We care more about output than credentials.



Compensation

Compensation will be determined based on experience.



Additional Requirements

1. Technology & Equipment Requirements

-Reliable high-speed internet and computer

-Webcam + microphone for Zoom calls

-Quiet, professional workspace

-Must be willing to 



2. Availability Requirements

-Ability to work U.S. Eastern Time

-Must provide advanced notice for planned time off

-Must maintain consistent communication (Slack responsiveness,
, etc.)

- Implementing responsive UI components (Bootstrap or similar frameworks)

- Integrating backend services and databases (e.g. Firebase, Supabase, MongoDB)

- Implementing authentication systems and login integrations (Google, AWS, etc.)

- Contributing to web and app development

- Implementing features for online shop systems / e-commerce workflows

- Building maintainable and scalable frontend architectures

- We use Microsoft Teams for communication, ClickUp for project management, and GitHub for code and CI/CD.

- (IMPORTANT): Using AI coding tools and AI-assisted workflows to accelerate development (we are mostly using Augment Code and Claude Code, paid accounts will be provided)



Required Skills & Experience

- at least 5 years of programing experience

- very good english verbally and written (you will need to share your vision with us in videocalls)

- Strong knowledge of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript

- Solid experience with TypeScript

- Experience with modern frontend frameworks such as: Vue.js / React.js / Angular

- Experience with Nuxt.js

- Good knowledge of Bootstrap

- Hands-on experience with Firebase, Supabase, or MongoDB

- Experience with app development

- Understanding of authentication systems and login integrations

- Experience using AI coding tools and AI-supported development workflows

- Understanding of online shop / e-commerce processes



Optional but Helpful Skills

- Experience with Ionic

- Experience with Electron



What We Value

- Structured, independent, and solution-oriented work style

- Strong technical understanding of modern web and app architectures

- Ability to quickly learn new technologies and tools

- Strong interest in using AI tools to work faster and more efficiently (we are using it ALOT and try to be adaptive to it all time)

- Ownership mindset and reliability in remote work



Payments

- Payments are made via Wise directly to your bank account based on monthly invoices.



Benefits

- fixed amount of work hours, but flexible working times – results matter, not the time of day you work

- Work is tracked via ClickUp tasks

- Daily availability for quick updates (Mon–Fri) via Microsoft Teams

- 25 paid vacation days + 5 paid sick days per year

- Salary increases based on performance

- Equipment support (PC hardware, monitors, etc.) after some months of beeing with us

- Friendly remote team with experienced international contractors

- Strong learning environment



Application Steps (mandatory):

- Please apply via our application form -> 
/
/f/8caxhzj-1612/37PIVDDTR2XZNAFPXX

- Enter "SPAMCHECK" in the field "Are you an AI?"



Our hiring process usually includes:

1. Application review (we look at each candiate and gather internal feedback)

2. A paid test week

3. Signing a long-term independent contractor agreement & NDA



Personal Note from Michael:

We are real humans, we like to give feedback, value work and people and I, especially, try to be on the edge of the newest tech. That means we are leveraging AI coding and assisted coding alot.



We’re excited to welcome you onboard :)



Best regards,

Michael Bicker

title: Performance Video Editor for Meta Ads (eCommerce + AI Tools)
description:
We are looking for a performance-focused video editor who can create high-converting Meta Ads for eCommerce brands.



This role is for someone who understands direct-response advertising, not just video editing.



You will take:



scripts

product details

brand briefs

creative direction

references



and turn them into video ads designed for
 and Instagram.



In many cases, raw footage will not be available, so you must be comfortable sourcing or creating the visual material needed using:



stock footage

organic-style clips

simple motion graphics

static images

AI-assisted workflows

Main responsibilities:

Create video ads for Meta Ads 
 and Instagram)

Turn scripts and briefs into direct-response creatives

Source or create visuals when raw footage is not available

Edit in 9:16, 4:5, and 1:1 formats

Create strong hooks, pacing, text overlays, subtitles, and CTAs

Make creative variations for testing

Use AI tools when useful to improve speed and execution

Follow feedback and revise quickly

Required:

Experience editing ads for Meta Ads / paid social

Strong understanding of direct-response structure

Ability to work from script + brief + references

Good taste in pacing and ad storytelling

Comfortable using CapCut, Premiere Pro, After Effects, or similar

Comfortable using AI tools as part of your workflow

Good written English

Reliable communication and attention to detail

Nice to have:

eCommerce experience

UGC ad experience

Experience with emotional/lifestyle brands

Familiarity with creative testing

To apply, please send:

3 to 5 examples of Meta ads or direct-response ads you edited

A short explanation of your role in each project

The tools you use for editing and AI workflows

Your hourly rate and fixed rate per completed ad

Your weekly availability



Please write HOOK FIRST at the end of your application so I know you read everything carefully.



Shortlisted candidates will be invited to complete a small test project based on a real product brief.



We are looking for someone reliable, creative, and performance-minded who can grow with us long term.

title: Creative Strategist – Facebook/Meta Ads (Fashion & Apparel)
description:
We don't run ads for random Shopify brands. We run Meta ads for legacy fashion houses - Von Dutch, Ed Hardy, the brands that shaped streetwear culture, the ones your favorite rappers wear, the ones people recognize by the logo alone. If you've been grinding away making ads for no-name DTC brands nobody's heard of, this is your way out.



We're a performance marketing agency scaling fast with some of the most iconic names in fashion as clients. Meta ads are our growth engine. We test relentlessly, we scale winners, and we hold an extremely high bar on creative.



We're hiring a Creative Strategist to own our entire creative operation for fashion and apparel accounts. You'll have full autonomy over creative direction, you'll own the testing roadmap, and you'll earn performance bonuses tied directly to the results you produce. No micromanagement. No slow approvals. No ceiling on what you can earn.



This role is for someone who's obsessed with fashion, understands what makes people stop scrolling and buy, and wants to work with brands that actually matter. If you want comfort and predictability, this isn't for you. If you want to build something real with legacy brands and get paid like it, keep reading.



Key Responsibilities:

- Analyze Meta ad performance data daily to identify winning creatives, dying concepts, and new opportunities

- Build creative briefs and develop new angles, hooks, and concepts across static, video, and UGC formats

- Own and manage a creative testing roadmap - new concepts, iterations, format tests, audience-specific variations

- Script ads, write ad copy, and direct output for designers and editors with clear, actionable feedback

- Research competitors, trends, and cultural 
nts in fashion to fuel the creative pipeline

- Report on creative performance weekly and make strategic recommendations on what to scale, iterate, or kill

- Contribute to creative strategy for new brand launches and product drops



Requirements:

- Direct experience running or strategizing Meta ads for fashion, apparel, or streetwear brands - this is non-negotiable, do not apply without it

- 2+ years in creative strategy, direct response copywriting, or a similar role in DTC e-commerce

- Able to read and interpret Meta ad data directly - hook rate, CTR, CPM, CPA, ROAS - and turn it into creative decisions

- Proficient with creative analysis tools like Motion, Foreplay, Atria, or similar

- Experience managing designers or editors and giving feedback that actually improves output

- Comfortable using AI tools (Claude, Nano Bannana) to accelerate scripting, ideation, and research

- High sense of ownership - you see the gap, you fill it, you don't wait to be told



Why Us:

- You'll work with brands people actually know and care about - not another generic supplement company or dropshipping store

- Your earnings are directly tied to performance with significant uncapped upside

- Your creative decisions will immediately impact how fast we scale iconic fashion brands

- You'll have real autonomy and ownership over the creative function, not a cog-in-the-machine role

- You'll work alongside people who move fast, reject mediocrity, and care about doing things right



If you're a creative strategist who's tired of making ads for brands nobody's heard of and you want to own creative for names that shaped the culture, apply now.



To Apply:

1. What fashion or apparel brands have you run or strategized Meta ads for? (One sentence is fine.)

2. Upload your portfolio or resume. (PDF or link.)



If you don't have fashion/apparel industry experience, please don't apply.

title: emu Expert ONLY – Senior Growth Partner ($20k-$100k Profit Target)
description:
JOB DESCRIPTION

ATTENTION: We are looking for a WORLD-CLASS Temu Specialist. Do NOT apply if you don't have proven experience scaling stores on Temu.



I am Adv. Matan Leker, owner of Leker Projects LLC (US-based). We operate a high-level US-to-US model using Shopify Collective and authentic US suppliers. Our infrastructure is fully ready with a verified Mercury bank account.



The Mission:

Our store is live but currently stuck at 4 impressions. We need a specialist who can unlock the algorithm and scale the operation to a minimum of $20,000 monthly net profit, with a long-term goal of $100,000.



The Terms:

Monthly Salary: $800 USD (Fixed base).



Working Hours: 8 hours per day (Full-time, 40 hours per week).



Bonuses: High-percentage Profit Share for hitting performance milestones.



Requirements (Mandatory):

Proven Temu Mastery: You must have experience in "Semi-Managed" or Local-to-Local models.



Shopify Integration: Deep knowledge of syncing Shopify Collective inventory and tracking with Temu automatically.



Account Health: Proven ability to maintain a 100% clean account with zero violations.



How to Apply (THE TEST):

As a legal professional, I only hire based on evidence. Do not send a generic message. You MUST include a 1-minute Loom video showing:



A live Temu dashboard you managed with consistent revenue.



Proof of successful daily payouts.



Your plan to fix the "4 impressions" visibility issue.



NO LOOM VIDEO = NO REPLY.



Best regards,

Adv. Matan Leker

Owner, Leker Projects LLC

title: Cold Caller w/ Sales Experience
description:
Remote | Full-Time | Immediate Start

9:00 AM - 5:00 PM EST | Full-Time



We’re looking for confident, coachable people who can get on the phone and make things happen!

We're Tampa Diabetic Exchange, a fast-moving supplier of diabetic products to pharmacies across the US. We're expanding our cold calling team and we want hungry people who can grind, learn fast, and earn commissions.



What you’ll do:

- Make 150+ outbound calls per day (scripts and leads provided)

- Collect decision-maker info from independent pharmacies (names and
s)

- Set follow-ups and close accounts. You’ll learn how, we’ll train you

- Track your work and update our CRM daily



What you’ll get:

- Performance-based commissions and training allowance

- 13-day paid training program (2 days onboarding, 11 days live dials)

- Real earning potential if you hustle and close

- Opportunity to get hired full-time after training



What we’re looking for:

- Clear English speaker with strong phone confidence

- Fast learner who can take feedback and improve quickly

- Previous experience in cold calling, telesales, or healthcare sales

- Reliable internet, laptop with headset, and a quiet place to work

- Sales experience is a MUST.

title: Case Manager – Day Program
description:
Must have 99 ID Proof

Healthcare a Plus!!!!



Case Manager – Day Program

TeamPHCA**



Position Summary

The Case Manager supports individuals enrolled in TeamPHCA’s Day Program by ensuring high-quality service coordination, consistent communication, compliance with ODP standards, and accurate documentation. This role works directly with the Lead Program Specialist, Program Specialist, and administrative leadership to manage scheduling, billing inputs, check-ins, progress notes, and communication with families, Supports Coordinators (SCs), staff, and other stakeholders. The Case Manager is responsible for maintaining professionalism, strong follow-through, and ensuring that all client needs are addressed promptly and accurately.



Key Responsibilities

Client Coordination & Scheduling

Support the scheduling of day program services, community participation activities, transportation needs, and specialty appointments.



Collaborate with the Lead and Program Specialist to ensure schedules reflect client goals, ISP requirements, staffing ratios, and safety considerations.



Update calendars, staffing schedules, and attendance logs daily to ensure accuracy for billing and reporting.



Inbound & Outbound Communication

Answer and return calls professionally, providing timely updates to families, staff, SCs, and stakeholders.



Make outbound calls for check-ins, scheduling updates, appointment reminders, and follow-up requests.



Respond to
s promptly, using professional tone, accurate information, and proper documentation protocols.



Maintain communication logs and ensure all relevant parties receive appropriate updates.



Client Check-Ins & Ongoing Monitoring

Conduct weekly, biweekly, and monthly check-ins based on need, risk level, and internal workflow requirements.



Document all check-ins in the appropriate system (
, WellSky, IntakeQ, etc.) with accurate detail and follow-up actions.



Identify changes in client behavior, needs, or circumstances and elevate concerns to the Program Specialist or Lead immediately.



Support the development and updating of individual plans by providing relevant client insights.



Monthly Progress Notes & Reporting

Complete monthly progress notes reflecting ISP goals, attendance, participation, progress, barriers, and recommendations.



Submit all documentation by internal deadlines to ensure timely billing and compliance.



Review ISP goals and ensure monthly summaries align with service delivery and observed progress.



Assist in collecting data for quarterly or annual reviews, audits, and stakeholder reporting.



Compliance, Billing & Documentation

Ensure all documentation, communication logs, check-ins, progress notes, and reports meet compliance standards of ODP 6100/2380.



Support billing inputs by confirming attendance, ensuring schedules are accurate, and reporting discrepancies immediately.



Report i
, call-outs, client concerns, or missing documentation according to internal protocol.



Maintain confidentiality and uphold all regulatory requirements and organizational policies.



Staff Call-Outs & Daily Operations

Receive call-outs from staff and follow the appropriate notification and documentation process.



Communicate staffing gaps to leadership and support the Lead or Program Specialist in adjusting the schedule.



Notify families, SCs, and internal tea
mbers when staffing or scheduling changes affect service delivery.



Maintain calm, professional communication regardless of urgency or unexpected changes.



Stakeholder Communication

Interact professionally with Supports Coordinators, families, community partners, and other stakeholders.



Provide updates during meetings regarding client progress, scheduling issues, compliance needs, and service utilization.



Support stakeholder satisfaction by delivering accurate, timely, respectful communication.



Skills & Qualifications

Experience in case management, human services, day programs, or IDD support preferred.



Strong communication skills—written, verbal, and interpersonal.



Ability to manage multiple cases, tasks, and deadlines simultaneously.



Proficient with 
, Google Sheets, Google Workspace, or similar platforms.



Strong documentation, organization, and follow-up skills.



Professional demeanor, especially when interacting with families and SCs.



Understanding of ODP standards, ISP goals, and service documentation (preferred but not required).



Ability to remain composed and solution-oriented during crises, call-outs, or scheduling challenges.



Work Environment & Expectations

Maintain confidentiality and comply with 6100/2380 regulations at all times.



Report directly to the Lead and Program Specialist and collaborate closely with administrative leadership.



Demonstrate professionalism, punctuality, and consistency in communication and documentation.



Attend meetings and confidently report updates on caseloads, progress notes, follow-ups, and compliance status.



Support the day program’s mission to deliver person-centered, high-quality services to every individual







Pay is bi-weekly with our current pay period

Benefits



Competitive Monthly Salary

Pay includes health insurance

$100.00 - Quarterly Bonuses (When we reach our goals)

Annual Bonuses - Based on Company Profits

Employee of the month bonus (after 5 months and selection)

Supervisory Support

Paid Time Off (1) day off per month (after 5 months) Must put in a 2-week notice (Cannot Take off on Mondays or Fridays)

Room for advancement to take on leadership positions

Paid Rotating Holiday (Christmas or Thanksgiving) 1 day only

TeamPHCA Pays for your PayPal fees



*********************************************************

Schedule

8:00AM - 5:00PM Eastern Standard Time (1-hour lunch break) (Monday - Friday)



********************************************************

Interviews: We may request an immediate interview via Google Meets



Please arrive on time

Must have a camera on

You must be in an environment conducive to work with no children, music, family, or pet distractions

Your internet, computer, and microphone, keyboard must all be operable -Must have backup plan internet.

title: Operations Manager & Executive Assistant
description:
!!! ONLY FOR WOMEN !!! MUST BE LOCATED IN CLARK OR ANGELES CITY; DAILY PHYSICAL OFFICE PRESENCE IS MANDATORY. 

We are a private, fast-paced BPO boutique establishing a new specialized operations center in the Clark/Angeles area. We are looking for an "Alpha" Operations Manager to serve as the local Right-Hand for the Director.



We don't do traditional customer service. We focus on High-Value Lead Management, Financial Verticals, and Conversion Optimization. We need a leader who understands the "Sales Floor" energy and can maintain 100% discipline.



Key Responsibilities:



Elite Recruitment: Scouting and hiring a high-performing team of 8 female agents specializing in Sales, Retention, and High-Touch Client Relations.



Floor Control: Implementing strict "No-Phone" policies, data security, and maintaining a high-performance atmosphere.



Conversion Tracking: Monitoring team KPIs, ensuring high-velocity outreach, and managing daily reporting to the Director.



Executive Liaison: Handling all local administrative, logistics, and confidential business matters with absolute loyalty.



Requirements (The Profile):



Industry Experience: 1+ years in BPO Management. Specific experience in Financial Services, Trading, or High-Ticket Sales/Retention is a massive advantage.



Mindset: You must be "thick-skinned," highly authoritative, and results-oriented. You know how to push a team to hit targets.



Availability: We need a 24/7 mentality for this startup phase.



Life Situation: Single/No dependents preferred. We need a candidate with zero distractions, zero debts, and full focus on the operation.



Appearance: Must maintain a highly polished, professional, and corporate image at all times.



Discretion: Absolute confidentiality is the foundation of this role. You will be trusted with sensitive operational data.

title: Intake Specialist – TeamPHCA
description:
Must have 99 ID Proof

Healthcare a Plus!!!!



Intake Specialist – TeamPHCA

Position Summary:

The Intake Specialist plays a critical role in ensuring a streamlined, professional, and compliant intake experience for all prospective individuals and families entering TeamPHCA’s programs. This role is responsible for collecting, organizing, and verifying required documentation; communicating with families, Supports Coordinators (SCs), and internal departments; and updating all intake statuses across TeamPHCA’s systems. The Intake Specialist maintains a confident presence during meetings, provides clear reporting on progress, and ensures all information is accurate, timely, and aligned with ODP 6100/2380 regulations and internal policies.



Key Responsibilities:

Intake & Documentation Management

Initiate and manage intake workflows from initial inquiry through enrollment and post activities.



Request ISPs, update waiver status, and verify authorization, waiver eligibility, medical, and support needs.



Collect and complete required documentation (ID, emergency contacts, physicals, assessments, etc.) and ensure compliance with regulatory requirements.



Track application and commitment packet completion, including reminders at 72 hours, 1 week, and SC follow-up.



Maintain professional, timely communication with families, SCs, and referral partners via our general mailbox. 



Lead Management & Communication

Receive, track, and follow up on all leads generated through marketing, SC referrals, outreach events, and online platforms.



Respond promptly to inquiries and schedule intake calls, virtual walkthroughs, or in-person meetings/virtual meet & greets. .



Convert qualified leads into scheduled intakes and ensure warm handoffs to Case Management and Program Specialists.



Systems, Reporting & Data Tracking

Manage all intake stages using

title: Billing Support Administrator
description:
Role Overview



As a Billing Support Administrator, you are the first point of contact for our customers and the go-to for the team’s support needs. You will manage the flow of communication, ensure our databases remain the “source of truth,” and provide critical administrative backing to our team of Billing Specialists.



Key Responsibilities



 & Triage 

• Monitor and maintain the main billing inbox.

• Tag
s with property identifiers and assign complex requests to the correct specialist.

• Respond directly to customer inquiries and provide copies of invoices or statements.

Data Integrity 

• Update
 and address data across multiple systems when customers request.

• Document all changes and communications in the database to ensure a clear audit trail.

Compliance & Setup 

• Complete vendor setup documentation for new clients.

• Coordinate with insurance companies to obtain updated COIs (Certificates of Insurance).

Client Relations 

• Act as the first point of contact for the billing phone extension.

• Resolve general inquiries and transfer complex calls to the appropriate tea
mber.

Process & Quality 

• Perform monthly report reviews to ensure data accuracy.

• Assist the team in updating and refining SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures).



Who You Are

• A Master of Multitasking: You can switch from updating a database to answering a phone call without losing your place.

• Detail Specific: You understand that in billing, a “small” mistake can lead to an avalanche of problems, so you double-check everything.

• Tech-Savvy: You are comfortable navigating multiple software systems simultaneously.

• A Clear Communicator: You can explain billing nuances to customers with empathy and professionalism.

• Customer Satisfaction Oriented: Ensuring the customer is receiving timely responses that answer all of their inquiries without multiple back and forth.



Qualifications & Skills

• 1–3 years of experience in an administrative or customer support role.

• Strong organizational skills and experience managing high-volume inboxes, phone lines, and internal requests.

• Preferred but not required: experience with QuickBooks, NetSuite, and Salesforce.

mbers with accounting-related questions

BEFORE APPLYING, PLEASE MAKE SURE THAT YOU READ THE JOB DESCRIPTION. IF YOU DO NOT HAVE EXPERIENCE IN PROPERTY MANAGEMENT ACCOUNTING, CAM RECONCILIATIONS, AND USING YARDI VOYAGER, WE RESPECTFULLY ASK THAT YOU DO NOT APPLY.

How to Apply

title: Digital Marketer (Ecommerce/Social Media)
description:
APPLICATION PROCESS:

1.
 us your resume in PDF format only. Include all of the jobs you've worked at and the month + year. Do not leave anything off. Do not leave anything off. You must provide an explanation of any gaps in your work history. Include the compensation you received for each job. Do not give us your hourly pay, only your annual compensation or total compensation. If there is any gap in your resume without an explanation of the gap, you will be disqualified.



2.
 us a 60-second video of yourself answering the following question:

What are the 3 most important things that the company you work for MUST do to show you that they care about you? For example, if they don’t give me these 3 things then that means they don’t care about me. The video CANNOT EXCEED 60 seconds, or you will automatically be disqualified.



3. IMPORTANT: Please
 the above two items to 
 to follow the above instructions will result in automatic disqualifications. Do not DM us or call us or contact us in any other way.



ABOUT OUR COMPANY:

Achieve Integrative Health is the #1 rated Acupuncture & Wellness Clinic in the United States with over 750 five star google reviews. Our Mission is to help people restore their body’s God given ability to heal itself so that they can do what they love. Our vision is to equip and inspire one million people around the world to do what they love, when they want, with whom they want. (
)



BENEFITS & COMPENSATION

* Competitive Total Compensation = $5-$15 USD/hr (base salary + bonuses)

* Unlimited Opportunities for Growth = as long as you can generate more results for the company we will never limit your ability to grow within our company. Every tea
mber can also become a partner of the business if they desire.

* Other Benefits for qualified tea
mbers = paid-time off, premiu
dical insurance, Employee Savings Matching Program

* Work from Home = no more 2-4 hour commutes to work

* Wellness Initiatives = benefit from complimentary virtual health services from our medical providers, ensuring your well-being and your family’s well-being is always a priority.

* everybody starts at $5 usd/hr during the first 3 months probation period.  The first 3 months we are testing your technical skills.

* After the first 3 months, your productions will be evaluated based on our standards of editing. We will rate your productions on a scale of 1 to 5. 5 is your productions are 100% in alignment with our standards of editing. 3 = your productions are 50% in alignment with our standards of editing. 1 = your productions are completely opposite of our standards of editing.

* a rating of 5 will result in your base salary increasing to $10/hr and you'll qualify to earn quarterly bonuses, giving you the potential to earn a total compensation of $15/hr.  (note: at this hourly rate, you will be required to produce 2x more than your first 3 months, more pay means more production requirements)

* a rating of 3 will result in no increase in base salary

* a rating of 1 will result in termination of employment



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

* Create and manage our shopify account to promote our e-commerce business

* Edit long form and short form videos daily for e-commerce and clinic and social media

* create & graphics for clinic projects and e-commerce business (eg t-shirt designs) 



TECHNICAL QUALIFICATIONS:

* We do not provide training for technical skills (multimedia editing, shopify) you are expected to already know how to do this

* you must have experience with Shopify and ecommerce sites

* must be able to edit videos & graphics quickly everyday short-form, long-form, multiple images

* must be highly organized as you will need to manage multiple tasks everyday



CHARACTER REQUIREMENTS:

• You must truly have a caring heart and truly want to help people improve their health, if you are mainly focused on how much money you can make, we are not the team for you

• You must be able to follow instructions exactly as written, if you don’t like reading or following instructions, we are not the right team for you

• You must have a good heart. If you like to gossip behind peoples back, please don’t apply.

• You must value Results over effort. If you like to be paid based on how many tasks you completed or how much responsibilities you have, we are not the team for you. We pay ONLY based on you meeting your KPIs, metrics, quotas.

• You must be honest and have integrity. If you are caught lying, you will be immediately terminated.

• You must want to EARN your pay (ie. base salary + bonuses) instead of being given a pay (ie. focused only on base salary) that you didn’t earn.



WORK SCHEDULE:

* Full-time = minimum of 40 hrs/wk.  You have the flexibility to choose your work hours, however, all tasks must be completed & submitted by 5am CST everyday M-F, and you required to attend our morning team huddles from 8:09am-8:45am cst M-F.



* Part-time = 20 hrs/wk. You have the flexibility to choose your work hours, however, all tasks must be completed & submitted by 5am CST everyday M-F, and you required to attend our morning team huddles from 8:09am-8:45am cst M-F.

title: AI Video Generator
description:
We're looking for a video editor who's fluent with generative video tools—specifically Seedance 2.0, Runway, and similar models. You're not just hitting generate and hoping; you're using these as actual production tools, understanding their outputs well enough to integrate them into real creative workflows.

You'll own the production pipeline for Babaru content—from concept to final render. That means: structuring narratives, directing prompts to AI models for the specific shot/style you need, assembling the raw outputs, color-grading, sound design, and delivering polished content.

What You'll Do



Operate generative video models (Seedance 2.0, Runway, etc.) with technical precision—understanding latency, memory, output characteristics

Edit and composite AI-generated video with traditional footage, VFX, and graphics

Build templates and workflows that other creators on the team can follow

Ship weekly content (hero videos, shorts, mockumentaries) that hit brand voice exactly

Collaborate with creative direction but work independently on execution

Troubleshoot model outputs, iterate on prompts, optimize for quality vs. render time



Who You Are



3+ years video editing experience (Premiere, After Effects, or equivalent)

Hands-on experience with at least two generative video tools (Seedance, Runway, Pika, etc.)

You understand codec, resolution, frame rate, and color space—not just what looks good

Fast iteration mindset; you ship rough cuts and polish in response to feedback

You can take direction from a voice/vibe and execute without a script

Portfolio that shows you've actually integrated AI tools into finished work (not just AI-generated clips)



Nice to Have



Sound design basics (Audition, Reaper, or equivalent)

Experience with animation or motion graphics

Familiarity with Hong Kong/Asia creative market preferences

Comfortable learning new generative tools as they ship



Why This Matters

Babaru launches in weeks. We're shipping hero video, shorts, mockumentaries, and party game content—all of it needs to feel cohesive, intentional, and fast. This role is about making AI video tools work in service of real creative vision, not the other way around.

title: Junior Systems Administrator (Client Services)
description:
We are seeking a proactive Junior Systems Administrator to help manage and maintain the IT infrastructure and business applications for our diverse group of clients. In this role, you will be responsible for ensuring that our clients' systems are secure, up-to-date, and performing optimally.

 

This is a dynamic MSP role where no two days are the same. You will move between different client environments, gaining hands-on experience managing various cloud setups, security protocols, and enterprise software. This is a perfect role for someone who wants to move beyond basic helpdesk support and into multi-tenant systems management.

 

Key Responsibilities

*Client System Administration

   - Assist in the administration of core business platforms for clients (e.g., Microsoft 365, Entra ID/Active Directory, and CRM systems).

  - Monitor client system health, performance, and security logs to identify and resolve potential issues proactively.

  - Manage user onboarding/offboarding, permissions, and access levels across various client software platforms.

*Security & Compliance Management

  - Help implement and enforce security best practices for clients, including MFA, password policies, and endpoint protection.

  - Assist with software patching, updates, and system backups to ensure client data integrity and business continuity.

  - Participate in basic security audits and help document compliance procedures for client environments.

*Infrastructure & Network Support

  - Support the configuration and maintenance of client network devices (firewalls, switches, and Wi-Fi access points).

  - Assist in managing client cloud infrastructure and virtual environments.

  - Troubleshoot hardware and software issues escalated from the general support level.

*Documentation & Client Communication

  - Maintain accurate records of client system configurations, hardware inventory, and software licenses.

  - Create and update "How-To" guides and technical documentation for client users and internal tea
mbers.

  - Provide clear, professional updates to clients regarding the status of their systems and projects.



Qualifications (Required)

*Technical Foundation: 0–3 years of experience in IT support or a related technical role (MSP experience is a major plus).

*Operating Systems: Strong familiarity with Windows 10/11 and a basic understanding of Windows Server.

*Cloud Basics: General knowledge of Microsoft 365 administration (users, groups, and licenses).

*Networking Knowledge: Understanding of basic networking concepts (TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, VPNs).

*API Awareness: Basic understanding of how APIs work and comfort navigating technical documentation.

*Communication: Excellent verbal and written communication skills with a strong customer-service mindset.



Preferred (Nice to Have)

*Experience with virtualization (Hyper-V, VMware) or cloud platforms (Azure, AWS).

Why Join Us?



We believe in creating an environment where our tea
mbers can thrive both professionally and personally. Here’s what we offer:



*Career Growth: Paid certifications, training, and structured onboarding to help you advance your skills.

*Attractive Compensation: Competitive salary, performance-based incentives (monthly profit share and end-of-year bonus), and 13th-month pay.

*Health & Wellness: Monthly healthcare allowance to support your well-being.

*Work-Life Balance: 100% remote work with company-provided equipment.

*Supportive Culture: Be part of a forward-thinking team that values collaboration, innovation, and having fun while doing great work.



What Sets Us Apart?



*Performance-Based Rewards: Monthly profit sharing and bonuses for high-performing tea
mbers.

*Continuous Learning: We invest in your growth with paid certifications and training.

*Collaborative Environment: Work with a team that values your input and supports your success.

*Flexibility: Enjoy the freedom of remote work while contributing to impactful projects.



How to Apply

If you’re ready to take your IT career to the next level, we’d love to hear from you! Apply now and join a team that’s passionate about technology, growth, and delivering exceptional service.



**Submit your application and include the numbers (1989) in your subject line. This helps us ensure you’ve read the full job description.



**Please also attach your updated CV to your application or provide a link to your CV. Applications without a CV will not be considered.



**Currently looking for candidates in NCR or nearby areas of the Philippines



This is an overnight position. The working hours for this role are 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM CST Monday to Friday.



We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Paid Ads Manager for Ecom/DTC
description:
We’re Looking For Someone Who Can Push Budget, Launch Tests Fast, And Scale Winners.

We care about execution, speed, and results.



At fatjoe, we run paid acquisition across multiple channels and constantly test new offers, creatives, and campaigns. That means lots of ads, lots of iterations, and lots of data.



If you can’t handle high testing velocity, large numbers of creatives, and aggressive scaling, this role isn’t for you.

But if you can… keep reading.



About fatjoe

fatjoe delivers marketing services to thousands of agencies and brands worldwide.

Bootstrapped and founder-led. No corporate bureaucracy.

We’ve grown to $15M+ annual revenue with a lean team under 20 people, and we’re just getting started.



Our mission is simple: Build the most scalable marketing services platform in the world.



To do that, we need people who move fast and care about results.

Not meetings.

Not bureaucracy.

Not corporate theatre.



The Role

We run a lot of ads. We test a lot of creatives. We push budgets when things work.

Your job is to launch, manage, and optimise paid campaigns across Meta Ads, Google Ads & Linkedin Ads, while keeping our testing machine running smoothly.

This is not a beginner's role.



You’ll be expected to:

* Launch campaigns quickly and correctly

* Manage large volumes of creatives

* Monitor performance daily

* Identify winners and scale budgets

* Kill losers fast

* Keep campaigns organised and structured



Execution speed matters.

If you’re slow, disorganised, or afraid to push budgets — this isn’t the job for you.



Responsibilities:

* Launch and manage Meta Ads and Google Ads campaigns at scale

* Upload and test large volumes of creatives on Meta

* Manage Search, Performance Max, and display campaigns on Google

* Monitor campaign performance daily across both platforms

* Work with creators and platforms on ad creative

* Identify winning creatives, audiences, and keywords

* Scale budgets aggressively when campaigns perform

* Cut losing ads quickly

*Maintain clear campaign structures and naming conventions

* Troubleshoot ad delivery issues, rejections, and tracking problems

* Report key metrics clearly (ROAS, CPA, CTR, CPM, etc.)

* Work closely with our marketing team to keep the testing system running



Requirements:

You’ve done this before.

Not theory. Not a course. Real ad accounts.



Minimum requirements:

* 2+ years managing Meta Ads and Google Ads.

* Strong experience running Meta creative testing campaigns

* Experience managing Google Search and Performance Max

* Experience managing high-volume ad accounts

* Comfortable launching large numbers of creatives

* Strong understanding of ad metrics (ROAS, CPA, CTR, CPM)



Bonus Points:

* Advanced Google Ads optimisation experience

* Experience with eCommerce or DTC brands

* Experience managing £75k+ month ad spend

* Experience writing or briefing ad copy



This Role Is NOT For



This role is not for people who:

* Need constant supervision

* Work slowly

* Overcomplicate simple tasks

* Don’t understand Ads Manager

* Panic when budgets increase

* Can’t handle launching multiple campaigns daily

* Make careless setup mistakes



We move fast and expect people to keep up.



Compensation

Salary: $1000-$1400 per month (depending on experience)



Benefits:

* Fully remote and full-time role

* Work with a small, high performance marketing team

* Direct access to founder

* No corporate politics or bureaucracy



Hiring Process:

We keep things simple.

1. Submit your application here: 

**Note: you will need to record a short video intro

2. Short screening interview

3. Practical assessment

4. Offer



Ready to Apply?



If you:

* Love running paid ads

* Enjoy testing lots of creatives

* Can move fast without making mistakes

* Know how to scale winners



Then apply.

If not, this probably isn’t the role for you.

title: Job Title: Static Meta Ads Designer (AI Skills required) for Backpack Brand
description:
We are seeking a skilled Static Meta Ads Designer for our vacuum compression backpack brand which is active in several countries. We are scaling quickly and are looking for someone to elevate our creative process so we can scale further.



Ideally we are looking for long-term employees to join our team. There is a great deal of growth opportunity for those that consistently make a positive contribution to our company. Furthermore, we require someone with attention to detail, so at the top of your application please mention the word "fruit", so that we know you actually read this text. We are seeking candidates that can elevate our creative process and output.



About the role

You’ll create high-converting static ads (image-based) that drive clicks and purchases.



We’re testing various angles and formats: problem/solution, testimonials, visual storytelling, us vs. them.



You will be supplied with brand assets, product images, angle concepts, and copywriting.



You will be on boarded with training on the brand identity, info on the creative styling (Which you can also improve further), and also details on the customer personas.





What sets this role apart

We expect you to be skilled with AI image generation tools like Nano banana pro and Seedream etc.,

You’ll use these tools to generate fresh, unique ad creatives in line with the angle and copywriting.

Your creative opinion will always be welcomed and valued if you have ideas on how to improve an ad idea, creative or also the copywriting for example.



What we’re looking for

Experience designing static ads for Meta 
/IG), especially for e-commerce



Eye for direct-response design: not just beautiful, but strategic and conversion-focused



Strong skills in AI image creation to produce unique visuals that match our brand



Ability to deliver multiple iterations for testing, optimized for various placements (feed, story)



Proficiency in the English language, both written and oral?



This position will be paid by the hour, and we will provide you with work for full time hours. We are also open to part time to start if you are the perfect fit.



Please respond by providing your relevant experience, including a visible portfolio of static ads, and also your weekly availability in terms of hours.



EXPERIENCE WITH AI IMAGE GENERATION IS A MUST. Please show your portfolio with AI tools 



I look forward to your proposal and application.



Thank you.



Satish

title: Level 3 Support Engineer
description:
Location: Fully Remote (Ph)

Schedule: Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM–5:00 PM EST (with flexibility as needed for client impact events)

 

About T3 Tech Partners

 

T3 Tech Partners is the team MSPs rely on when challenges exceed Tier 2 or internal expertise. We operate as a Fractional Tier 3 partner, delivering advanced Microsoft 365, cloud, and security expertise to MSPs supporting diverse client environments.

Our engineers are trusted technical partners — leading implementations, resolving complex escalations, and working directly with MSP clients to execute real-world solutions.

________________________________________

Role Overview

We are seeking a senior-level Cloud Solutions Engineer (Level 3) to lead advanced Microsoft 365 and cloud initiatives, handle complex escalations, and implement solutions directly with MSP clients. This is a technical, customer-facing role — while not sales-focused, you will regularly work directly with customers to design and implement the solutions required to meet their business and technical needs.

This role requires strong technical depth, independence, and the ability to step into unfamiliar environments and software ecosystems with confidence.

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities

Advanced Cloud & Escalation Support

• Handle advanced and expert-level escalations related to cloud infrastructure and SaaS services.

• Serve as a senior escalation point for Microsoft 365 and cloud-related issues across multiple MSP environments.

• Perform root-cause analysis and implement long-term remediation for complex or recurring issues.

• Work directly with MSP clients and end customers to execute solutions and improvements.

 

Microsoft 365 (Core Focus Area)

• Architect, deploy, optimize, and support Microsoft 365 environments end-to-end, including:

      o Exchange Online (mail flow, security, migrations, troubleshooting)

      o SharePoint Online and OneDrive (architecture, permissions, governance, performance, migrations)

      o Microsoft Teams (policies, governance, troubleshooting)

• Perform and lead tenant-to-tenant migrations, including
, OneDrive, SharePoint, and Teams data.

• Execute server-to-cloud migrations, such as file servers to SharePoint or OneDrive.

• Expert-level administration and troubleshooting of:

      o Microsoft Intune (endpoint management, compliance policies, configuration profiles, application deployment, Autopilot)

      o Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD) including identity lifecycle, SSO, MFA, and hybrid identity

      o Conditional Access policy design and enforcement

      o Microsoft Defender (Endpoint, Office 365, Identity)

      o Microsoft Purview (data governance, retention, compliance, DLP)

• Implement and maintain Microsoft 365 security best practices across client tenants.

• Assist MSPs with tenant configuration, licensing strategy, and feature utilization.

 

Third-Party Application Integration

• Work with third-party software applications that integrate with Microsoft 365 
, identity, security, document management, line-of-business platforms).

• Support applications you may not have prior experience with, requiring:

      o Willingness to learn new platforms quickly

      o Ability to understand how third-party systems interact with Microsoft 365

      o Troubleshooting authentication, permissions, data flow, and integration issues

• Collaborate with vendors and MSPs to ensure proper configuration and supportability.

 

Server and Infrastructure Support

• Administer and troubleshoot Windows Server environments, including Active Directory, DNS, DHCP, Group Policy, and File Services. 

• Manage and support virtualization platforms (e.g., Hyper-V, VMware) in on-premises and hybrid configurations. 

• Perform server migrations, including lift-and-shift to Azure, P2V conversions, and workload transitions to cloud-hosted services. 

• Support and maintain backup and disaster recovery solutions, ensuring recoverability for both on-premises and cloud workloads. 

• Assist with decommissioning legacy on-premises infrastructure as part of cloud migration projects.

 

Projects, Optimization & Automation

• Lead cloud migration and optimization projects for MSP clients.

• Optimize Microsoft 365 environments for security, performance, and cost efficiency.

• Develop and maintain PowerShell scripts to automate Microsoft 365, Entra ID, Intune, and related administrative tasks.

• Recommend improvements, standards, and long-term strategies to MSP partners.

• Stay current on Microsoft 365 feature changes and emerging cloud technologies.

Availability & Support Expectations

• Standard working hours are 9:00 AM–5:00 PM EST.

• Some flexibility is required for high-impact client issues, critical changes, or migrations outside normal hours.

• This role is not on-call, but responsiveness during critical events is expected.

________________________________________

Qualifications

Required Experience

• 5+ years of hands-on experience with cloud solutions in an MSP or multi-tenant environment.

• Expert-level proficiency in:

      o Microsoft 365 (all major workloads and admin portals)

      o Microsoft Intune

      o Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD)

      o Conditional Access and MFA

      o Microsoft Defender and Purview

• Strong experience with:

      o Tenant-to-tenant Microsoft 365 migrations

      o Server-to-cloud migrations (e.g., file servers to SharePoint/OneDrive)

      o
 and data migrations

• Required experience with PowerShell for administration and automation.

• Experience with Google Workspace and cross-platform migrations.

• Expert-level understanding of SaaS security and cloud cost optimization.

• General knowledge of infrastructure and networking concepts.

• Proven experience working in MSP environments (required).

• Excellent native-level English communication skills, both written and verbal.

title: Social Media Manager/Graphics Designer
description:
We are looking for a creative, tech-savvy Social Media Manager to join our rapidly evolving podcast production and social media marketing business. You will be responsible for creating high-quality graphics, editing AI-generated copy, and scheduling content using Cloud Connect.



This is an output-based role designed for a professional who is efficient with their time and enjoys being rewarded for their production. We are looking for a long-term partner who can grow with us as the role evolves.



Compensation & Structure:

Base Pay: $40.00 USD per week (Guaranteed minimum for weekly meetings,
 management, and 30 minutes of coordination).

Production Pay: Once your weekly output exceeds the base, you are paid per item (Reels, Podcast Posts, Graphics). Our goal is for a standard workload to result in $100 per week.

Software Stipend: A $20.00 monthly stipend is provided to assist with your software subscriptions.



13th Month Pay: Eligible after 6 months of service.



Responsibilities:

Strategy: Use ChatGPT Plus/Gemini to help ideate and build monthly social media calendars. (We have built GPT's/GEMS for brand language)

Content Creation: Design custom graphics in Adobe Photoshop (no Canva-only designers, please).

AI Copywriting: Use AI to draft captions and hashtags, then edit them for brand voice and accuracy.

Scheduling: Fully manage the Cloud Connect dashboard to ensure all posts are scheduled and live.



Reporting: Join a weekly 30-minute meeting to review analytics and adjust strategy.

Workflow: Manage all tasks and deadlines within Asana.



Required Tools (VA Provided):

Adobe Photoshop (Latest Version)

ChatGPT Plus Subscription

Stable High-Speed Internet



Qualifications:

Proven experience in Social Media Management (experience with "Cloud Connect" or "Cloud Campaign" is a huge plus).

High proficiency in Adobe Photoshop.

Strong understanding of how to prompt and refine AI-generated content.

Excellent English communication (written and verbal).

title: Smart VA with great computer knowledge
description:
Hi VA,



Please read the text.



We are looking for an awesome admin / virtual assistants that can work well with Computer in general and with Excel.



Which is 6 to 8 hours.



The job will be from 8:00 AM to approx. 4 PM PHT time (for the training period it will be different and will have a few different deadlines) Yes you can take a break in between.



At the start it will NOT BE exactly 6 to 8 hours a day, it will start with 1 to 4 hours, and in a weeks time grow to 6 to 8 hours daily.



Weekends you will also need to work, but a lot less.



You will be working on preparing of a few excel files and also putting HS codes to products. It is NOT a simple job. Most people can do it, it will look overwhelming at first, but if you practice and get immediate feedback it will get easier in like a week.



We are looking for someone who is smart, can be fast, has attention to detail and go the extra mile when needed. Again you need to be smart.



Someone that can THINK, meaning thinking of how this can be done faster and better. Also see if what you are doing makes sense.



First hours we pay 3 USD per hour. After the first hour the next 10 hours we pay 3.50 Dollars per hour, after the first 10 hours if we both of us d
 to continue we will raise it to 4 dollars per hour, if after 100 hours you are happy with the work and we are also happy with what you have done, and you work in our main system we will raise it to 5 Dollars. After 2 months, we can discuss a pay raise to 5.50 - 7 USD per hour depending on how good you are. If you quit in 2 months or less your pay will be calculated for all hours at 3 USD. START your application with, S2A, write it twice.



If you are cum laude or summa cum laude the pay starts with 50 cents per hour higher.



If you have vacation coming up, or you will need off days in the next 3 months, please do not apply. Also if you have an emergency coming up please do not apply, we need someone that is consistent.



We can only pay through paypal at the beginning.



If you are really interested and want to give your self even more chances of getting the job please apply through this link:







It's not mandatory but it will give you an edge.



Hope to meet our awesome Admin/Virtual assistant soon.

title: Executive Assistant (A+ Level Only)

Repurpose long-form content into multiple short clips

Add captions, subtitles, and engaging visual elements

Assist in content ideation based on trends and proven viral formats

Schedule and post content across platforms

Track performance and help optimize content strategy over time

Maintain a consistent brand style and tone



What We’re Looking For:



Strong video editing skills (fast cuts, captions, pacing, hooks)

Understanding of viral content and social media algorithms

Ability to think creatively and suggest content ideas

Strong communication and reliability

Organized and able to meet deadlines consistently

Experience with content in business, sales, or entrepreneurship is a plus



Content Style We Want:



Fast-paced, attention-grabbing edits

Strong hooks in the first 1–3 seconds

Clean captions (Alex Hormozi style)

High retention and share ability

Content that makes people stop scrolling



Important:

We are looking for a long-term partner (NOT short-term work). The goal is to build a brand over the next 5–10 years. You will grow with the company and have consistent, ongoing work.



If you understand content, communicate well, and want to be part of building something big — this is for you.

title: Rockstar Real Estate Social Media Manager & Podcast Video/Audio Editor
description:
We are looking for a highly creative and reliable Virtual Assistant to join our team. Your primary focus will be managing our real estate social media presence and fully producing (video and audio) our two podcasts. If you have an eye for real estate marketing and are a wizard in professional editing software, we want to hear from you!



Key Responsibilities:

Real Estate Social Media Management:

Create, design, and schedule highly engaging social media posts tailored to the real estate market.

Write compelling captions that drive engagement and attract potential buyers/sellers.

Repurpose podcast content into short-form videos (Reels, TikToks, YouTube Shorts) to grow our audience.



Podcast Production (Audio & Video):

Edit two regular podcasts, handling both the video and audio components.

Clean up audio (remove background noise, balance levels, add intros/outros).

Edit multi-cam or standard podcast video footage, add lower thirds, and create a polished final product for YouTube.



MANDATORY Requirements:

Advanced Editing Skills: You must have proven experience editing both high-quality video and audio.

Software Proficiency: You must be proficient in top-tier industry software. (e.g., Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve for video; Adobe Audition, Logic, or ProTools for audio). CapCut alone is not sufficient for the main podcast edits.

Real Estate Experience: Previous experience creating content for the real estate industry is highly preferred.

Graphic Design: Strong skills in Canva or Adobe Photoshop for creating social media graphics and podcast thumbnails.

Tech Specs: A reliable, fast internet connection and an Apple computer capable of handling heavy video rendering.



What We Are Looking For:

Excellent English communication skills (written and spoken).

A self-starter who can meet deadlines without being micromanaged.

Someone with a strong portfolio showcasing both real estate social media graphics and long-form/short-form podcast editing.



How to Apply: To ensure you have read this entire post, please include the word "PROPERTY" in the subject line of your message.



In your proposal, please provide:

A brief introduction about your experience with real estate social media.

Links to your portfolio showing both graphic design work and podcast video/audio editing.

A list of the video and audio editing software you use on a daily basis.

A screenshot of your current internet speed.

title: Funnel and marketing strategist
description:
We are looking for a high-level Marketing Strategist for our performance marketing agency.



This is not a basic VA role.

This is not just a content or creative role.

This is for someone who understands marketing strategy as a whole — from angles and ad concepts to funnels, lead forms, conversion flow, and follow-up logic.



You will work closely with:



our founders

our media buyer

our creative designer

and sometimes directly with clients



Your job is to look at the full marketing system and improve it.



That means understanding:



what offer should be pushed

what angle should be tested

what message fits which audience

where the funnel is breaking

and what should be changed next



We mainly work with SaaS and some e-commerce brands.



What you’ll do

Develop marketing angles, campaign concepts, and testing hypotheses

Turn market research and competitor insights into clear strategic direction

Help shape offers, messaging, and funnel positioning

Connect ads to the right funnel stage and customer awareness level

Review performance data with our media buyer and d
 what to iterate next

Guide our creative designer with clear strategic input

Analyze competitor ads, funnels, positioning, and messaging

Spot whether the problem is in the ad, hook, offer, landing page, lead form, funnel logic, or follow-up

Monitor funnel performance and identify drop-off points

Improve lead form logic and qualification flow

Review campaigns and funnels before launch

Translate data and observations into a clear action plan

This role is for you if…

You understand marketing strategy beyond just ads

You know how offers, messaging, funnels, and follow-up all affect results

You can diagnose problems instead of guessing

You can look at performance and d
 what should happen next

You think in terms of customer journey, not isolated tasks

You can lead strategic direction for both creatives and funnel improvements

You are proactive, sharp, and independent

You care about business results, not just ideas

Requirements



You must have strong experience with most of the following:



Marketing strategy

Funnel strategy

Offer positioning

Messaging and angle development

Direct-response thinking

Competitor research

Ad strategy

Landing page logic

Lead form logic

Conversion flow analysis

Performance analysis and iteration

Working with designers and media buyers

Client communication

Strong bonus if you have experience with:

SaaS marketing

B2B lead generation

E-commerce direct response

Meta ads

Sales funnels

WhatsApp or follow-up flows

Diagnosing lead quality issues

Improving conversion rates across the funnel

Who is not a fit



This is not for you if:



you only know graphic design

you only know copywriting

you only know media buying

you need step-by-step instructions all the time

you cannot explain why a strategy should work

you only suggest “test more creatives” without deeper thinking

you do not understand funnels and conversion logic

What we care about most



We do not want average.

We want someone who can think like a strategist.



You should be able to answer questions like:



What is the real bottleneck in this funnel?

Is the issue the ad, the offer, the lead form, or the follow-up?

What should we test first, and why?

Which competitor patterns are worth reacting to?

What message fits this audience best?

Where in the customer journey are we losing people?

Communication



You must have:



excellent English

strong written communication

clear strategic thinking

confidence in giving recommendations



Hours



Flexible depending on fit, but we are looking for someone long-term who can become an important part of our team.



Pay



$9–$18/hour, depending on experience and level.



We will pay more for someone who is truly strong.



To apply



Send us a message with:



Your best 3 examples of work relevant to this role

A short explanation of a funnel or marketing problem you diagnosed and how you solved it

Your answer to this question:

If a campaign gets clicks but poor lead quality, what are the first 3 things you check and why?

Your answer to this question:

How do you d
 whether a problem comes from the ad, the offer, the landing page, the lead form, or the follow-up?

Put the words “Blue Funnel” in the first line of your application so we know you read everything



Applications without detailed answers will be ignored.

 and Instagram) to join our team. This role is execution-focused and requires daily ad launching, campaign creation, and active monitoring of Meta ad accounts at scale. You will be responsible for driving performance through precise structure, disciplined testing, and consistent optimization.

- Solid background in direct response e-commerce advertising (Shopify experience is a strong plus)

- Ability to scale ad spend while maintaining or improving ROAS

Why Work With Us
