- Clear processes, decisive execution, and room to scale with us

- Opportunity for long-term collaboration

title: Remote Last Mile Delivery Dispatcher (US Delivery Operations)
description:
About the Company



Dragonfly is a U.S.-based last-mile delivery company serving restaurants and catering businesses in major cities including New York City, Boston, Washington D.C., Chicago, Texas, and San Francisco. We coordinate high-volume daily deliveries and pride ourselves on reliability, speed, and great service.



We are a remote-first operations team and work with talented people across different time zones to keep our deliveries running smoothly every day.



---



What This Job Is



We are looking for a Remote Dispatcher who will manage live delivery operations for our U.S. markets. You will coordinate drivers on the ground in the U.S., handle real-time issues, and make sure deliveries happen on time, all from your home.



In addition to daily dispatch, you will also help recruit and onboard drivers when needed, to grow our delivery fleet.



This is a high-responsibility, fast-paced role. You must be someone who stays calm under pressure, forsee and plan things in advance, communicates & make a sound decison quickly and clearly, and can handle multiple tasks at the same time.



---



Daily Responsibilities



Dispatch & Operations:

- Monitor and manage live deliveries across multiple U.S. cities at once using Onfleet and Cartwheel

- Assign drivers to orders in real time and adjust routes as needed

- Communicate with drivers via Aircall (phone/calls) and internally via Slack (messaging) throughout your shift

- Quickly resolve issues, late drivers, missed pickups, route problems, without waiting to be told

- Keep accurate records and shift notes in *Google Suite* (Sheets, Docs, Gmail)

- Coordinate with the Operations Manager on escalations or major i



*Driver Hiring*

- Post job ads and screen applicants for open driver positions for your markets (Only when needed)

- Conduct initial interviews and assess driver suitability, (experience and gadgets) 

- Manage onboarding steps from document collection to first shift

- Keep the driver pipeline active so we always have coverage when needed



Requirements



-Prior dispatch experience is required, experience in last-mile delivery, catering logistics, food delivery operations, or similar is strongly preferred

- Able to manage multiple drivers and multiple live deliveries simultaneously

- Excellent English communication skills, written and verbal (you will be on calls with U.S.-based drivers)

- Fast-paced work attitude, you make decisions quickly and take ownership

- Reliable internet connection and a proper home work setup

- Experience with Onfleet, Cartwheel, Aircall, Slack, or Google Suite is a strong advantage

- Willing to work rotating shifts within 6:00 AM – 7:00 PM EST (evenings to early mornings in the Philippines)



---



What We Offer



- Competitive USD hourly rate (paid in USD)

- 100% remote, no commute, work from home

- Consistent shifts, 7–8 hours per day for 5 days a week.

- Supportive team with clear processes and tools



---

Work Setup: 100% Remote



Hours:Rotating shifts, 7–8 hours/day within 6:00 AM – 7:00 PM U.S. Eastern Time (EST).

In PH Time 6:00 AM EST = 6:00 PM PHT | 7:00 PM EST = 7:00 AM PHT (+1 day)



Rate: Competitive USD hourly rate, based on experience





How to Apply



Send your application with:

1. Your updated resume or CV

2. A short message (3–5 sentences) describing your dispatch or logistics experience



We review applications on a rolling basis. Only candidates with relevant dispatch experience will be contacted.

title: Remote Sales Enquiries Coordinator for Creative Company
description:
We are a long-established UK print, signage and creative production business with a reputation built over decades for quality, reliability and strong customer service. We work with businesses and organisations that value fast responses, practical solutions and a team that knows how to get things done.

We are looking for a highly organised and commercially aware Remote Sales Enquiries Coordinator to help manage inbound enquiries, support the sales process, and ensure customers receive timely, professional and well-written responses.

This role sits between customer communication and internal delivery. You will help qualify opportunities, coordinate with our internal quoting team, and use AI tools intelligently to draft customer responses that match our brand tone of voice and service standards.

The Role

You will be one of the first points of contact for inbound sales enquiries. Your job is to help move enquiries forward efficiently, making sure customers feel looked after, internal teams have the right information, and responses go out quickly and clearly.

You will also use AI as a practical tool to improve speed and consistency, while applying human judgement to ensure every message feels natural, accurate and aligned with the brand.

Key Responsibilities

Manage inbound sales enquiries from
, website, phone notes and other channels

Review customer requirements and extract the key information needed for quoting

Liaise closely with the internal quoting and estimating team to ensure quotes are progressed promptly

Draft and send customer responses in a professional, friendly and commercially aware tone

Use AI tools to help prepare responses, summaries and follow-ups while maintaining company voice

Ensure all communication is clear, accurate, well-written and tailored to the customer’s needs

Follow up on open enquiries and quoted opportunities to help improve conversion rates

Keep internal systems, notes and enquiry records updated and organised

Escalate urgent, high-value or complex enquiries to the relevant team member quickly

Help improve internal workflows, templates and AI-assisted response processes over time

What We’re Looking For

Strong written English and excellent communication skills

Experience in customer service, sales support, internal sales, account coordination or a similar role

Comfortable working remotely and managing tasks independently

Strong attention to detail and ability to handle multiple enquiries at once

Good judgement in balancing speed with accuracy

Confident working with internal teams to gather information and move jobs forward

Commercial awareness and an understanding of how strong communication supports sales

Comfortable using AI tools such as ChatGPT or similar platforms to improve efficiency

Able to learn and apply a specific company tone of voice consistently

Ideal Experience

Experience in print, signage, manufacturing, creative services, branded products or a related sector

Experience supporting a quoting, estimating or sales admin process

Familiarity with CRM systems, shared inboxes and workflow tools

Experience writing customer
s that feel polished, helpful and human rather than robotic

What Success Looks Like

Enquiries are responded to quickly and professionally

Internal quoting teams receive accurate and complete information

Customers feel looked after and informed throughout the process

AI is used well to improve speed without sacrificing quality or tone

Follow-up discipline improves quote conversion and customer experience

Communication reflects the quality, credibility and professionalism 

Personal Attributes

Calm, organised and dependable

Friendly and professional in written communication

Proactive and solutions-focused

Commercially minded

Comfortable with structure, process and continuous improvement

Able to represent the company well through every customer interaction

Why Join us

Be part of a respected and established UK business

Work remotely with flexibility

Help modernise and improve how a growing company handles sales communication

Play an important role in combining human judgement with AI-enabled workflows

Opportunity to grow with the business as systems and sales operations evolve

How to Apply

Please send your CV along with a short covering note explaining:

Your experience handling inbound customer or sales enquiries

Any experience working with quoting, estimating or sales support teams

How you have used AI tools to improve communication or workflow



Please note the salary will be made up of a base salary of $400 per month, then additional performance bonus of $400 per month too

title: Full-Stack Developer

title: GHL Automation Expert
description:
I’m looking for a highly experienced GoHighLevel (GHL) automation specialist who can build, optimize, and scale advanced workflows for my business.



Please do NOT apply if you only have basic experience. I’m specifically looking for someone who has built complex, revenue-generating systems inside GHL.



When applying, please answer the following:



1. What is the most advanced GHL automation system you’ve built?



   * Describe the workflow in detail (triggers, conditions, branching logic, integrations, etc.)

   * What was the goal of the system?

   * What were the measurable results (conversion rate, time saved, revenue impact)?



2. Walk me through how you would build the following system:



   * Lead comes in (form, SMS, or ad)

   * Automatically qualifies the lead

   * Sends personalized follow-ups (SMS/email/VM drops)

   * Books appointments

   * Handles no-shows and reactivation

   * Moves leads through pipeline stages automatically



3. What’s your approach to:



   * Avoiding automation errors or loops

   * Debugging broken workflows

   * Tracking performance inside GHL



4. What integrations have you worked with?

   (Examples: Stripe, Zapier, Make,
 Ads, Google Ads, Webhooks, APIs, etc.)



5. Have you worked with SaaS mode, sub-accounts, or white-label setups in GHL?



6. Share 2–3 examples (Loom/video/screenshots) of systems you’ve personally built.



7. If hired, how would you improve an existing underperforming GHL funnel/automation?



Bonus:



* Experience with lead scoring, AI follow-ups, or multi-channel campaigns

* Experience in [credit repair, real estate, agencies, coaching, etc.]



I’m looking for someone long-term who can take ownership of our automation systems and continuously improve them.

title: AI Editor
description:

REMOTE /WFH - FLEXIBLE SCHEDULE - LONGTERM

title: Real Estate Cold Caller (Part-Time) – 15 hrs/week ($7-$8/hr)
description:
I am a real estate investor looking for a high-energy, experienced Cold Caller to join my team. You will be responsible for calling homeowners across various markets in the United States to see if they are interested in a cash offer for their property.

Your Daily Tasks:

Virtual Prosecting: Use DealMachine to find distressed properties in assigned U.S. zip codes.

Outbound Calling: Make calls for 3 hours a day. You must be flexible to call East Coast, Central, or West Coast times depending on the leads.

Lead Qualification: Identify "Motivated Sellers," uncover their "Why," and confirm property condition.

CRM Management: Accurately update lead notes and skip-trace data in DealMachine.



Requirements:

Experience: Minimum 1-2 years of US Real Estate cold calling (Nationwide experience preferred).

Tech: Quiet home office, noise-canceling headset, and high-speed internet (must provide speed test).

Skills: Excellent English (American accent preferred) and the ability to handle tough objections.

Versatility: Ability to quickly learn the "vibe" of different U.S. markets (e.g., Midwest vs. Florida).

How to Apply (READ CAREFULLY):

To be considered, you must follow these 3 steps:

Subject Line: Change your subject line to: "NATIONWIDE - [Your Name] - Ready to Call"

Audio Sample: Include a link (Vocaroo or Google Drive) to a 30-60 second recording of you reading a real estate script.

The Test: In your message, tell me what your favorite color is so I know you read this entire post.

title: Medical Assistant
description:
Platonics is looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Medical Assistant to support one of our US-based healthcare clients. This role will primarily focus on patient communication, insurance verification, scheduling, and administrative support for a medical practice.



The ideal candidate has experience working with US healthcare systems, understands insurance verification and prior authorization workflows, and is comfortable working with electronic medical records (EMR).



Key Responsibilities:



Answer inbound calls and assist patients with general inquiries

Verify patient insurance and eligibility

Handle prior authorization requests

Schedule patient appointments

Perform general administrative and front desk tasks

Maintain accurate records using EMR systems



Requirements:



Strong English communication skills

Experience with medical insurance verification and eligibility

Experience handling prior authorizations

Experience supporting US healthcare providers or clinics

Must have recent experience using EPIC and Practice Fusion EMR systems



If you believe you are a good fit for this role, please send your CV along with a 1-minute voice recording briefly sharing your experience working with US healthcare providers, particularly in insurance verification, prior authorization, and your recent experience using EPIC and Practice Fusion. We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Lead Social Media Manager
description:
We’re hiring a Lead Social Media Manager on behalf of one of our clients. They’re looking for someone who can confidently lead a small team, manage content across multiple brands, and bring fresh ideas that align with both trends and business goals. This is a great opportunity for someone who enjoys both strategy and execution and is looking for a long-term remote role with real ownership.



What You’ll Do:



Lead and support a team of 3 Social Media Managers

Plan and build content strategies across multiple platforms

Review and approve content before publishing

Provide clear and constructive feedback to maintain quality

Track performance and share insights and recommendations

Stay on top of trends and suggest new content ideas

Work closely with marketing, design, and the CEO



What We’re Looking For:



2+ years of social media experience

At least 2 years in a leadership or management role

Strong understanding of Instagram, TikTok,
, Pinterest, and YouTube Shorts

Comfortable planning and reviewing daily content

Familiar with Canva, CapCut, Adobe, ClickUp, Slack, and Google Workspace

Strong communication and organizational skills

Someone looking for a long-term, stable role



How to Apply:



Please send your CV, portfolio, and a 1-minute voice recording introducing yourself and sharing your experience in social media management, team leadership, and the platforms you’ve handled.

title: Shopify & Amazon Store Operations Specialist
description:
Baie Botanique is an award-winning natural skincare brand selling internationally through Shopify and Amazon.

We are looking for a highly organised E-commerce Operations Specialist to support the day-to-day running of our Shopify stores and Amazon marketplaces and ensure everything operates smoothly.



Salary: 35,000 PHP



We are a small, experienced team looking for a reliable long-term tea
mber to grow with us..





**IMPORTANT:**

You must be comfortable working **UK hours (8am – 5pm Monday to Friday)**





What a Typical Week in This Role Looks Like



In this role, your week will involve a mix of operational tasks across our Shopify and Amazon stores.

Typical activities include:



• Checking Shopify and Amazon stores to ensure listings, pricing and content are accurate

• Monitoring customer orders and coordinating with fulfilment centres when needed

• Updating product pages, collections and website content using Shopify

• Tracking inventory levels across fulfilment locations

• Supporting improvements to product pages and store layout

• Responding to occasional customer
s relating to orders or deliveries (customer volume is generally low)

• Helping document operational processes as the business grows



Most tasks are operational and process-driven, with clear systems and support from the team.



1. Store & Marketplace Management



• Ensuring Shopify and Amazon listings are accurate and up to date

• Adding new products and maintaining existing listings

• Updating product pages, collections and site content

• Improving product page clarity and layout

• Troubleshooting issues with listings or pages



2. Orders, Fulfilment & Inventory



• Monitoring orders across Shopify and Amazon

• Communicating with fulfilment centres when needed

• Tracking inventory across locations

• Coordinating stock transfers between UK, EU and US fulfilment centres

• Reviewing fulfilment invoices and resolving discrepancies



3. Customer & Wholesale Support



• Responding to customer
s relating to orders and deliveries

• Resolving order issues or address updates

• Supporting communication with wholesale partners where required

• Assisting with marketplace partner coordination





4. Operational Improvements



• Helping document operational processes

• Supporting improvements to workflows and reporting

• Keeping systems organised as the business grows



General Operational Support



You may occasionally assist with additional operational tasks that support the wider e-commerce team.





Key Qualities We Are Looking For



We are looking for someone who:

- Works quickly, communicates proactively, and keeps tasks moving without delays

- Has hands-on experience with Shopify and/or Amazon, not just theoretical or support-level work

- Takes ownership of tasks and follows through without needing constant direction

- Is highly organised and detail-oriented

- Is comfortable working with product data, inventory tracking, and spreadsheets

- Can work independently and solve problems without step-by-step instruction



Benefits

• Full-time long-term remote position

• Work directly with an established international skincare brand

• Annual skincare allowance

• UK public holidays off

• Additional 5 days annual leave

• Stable working hours (UK time: 8am–5pm Monday–Friday)

• Opportunity to grow with the company as our e-commerce operations expand



You should already be comfortable working inside Shopify and ideally have some experience with Amazon.



Application Instructions

Please include the following in your application:

• Your CV (PDF preferred)

• A short introduction describing your experience with Shopify and Amazon

- 2 examples of Shopify stores or pages you have worked on



At the start of your application message, please include the word:

BOTANICAL

This helps us confirm that you have read the full job description.



Shortlisted candidates will be invited to record a 2–3 minute Loom video introducing themselves and discussing their Shopify and Amazon experience.

title: Cebu Technical Support Representative

I am looking for an ADVANCED GoHighLevel expert to build and manage a complete CRM, pipeline, and automation system for my credit repair and business funding company.



This starts as a project to build the system, and if everything works well this will turn into a long-term part-time position managing and improving automations and CRM systems.



I am NOT looking for a beginner. You must already have experience building GoHighLevel workflows, pipelines, triggers, SMS/email automations, calendars, and CRM systems.



I do NOT need someone to run ads. I need someone to build the backend CRM system, automations, and workflows.



SYSTEM I NEED BUILT:



CRM / PIPELINE

• Build CRM pipeline stages

• Lead tagging and organization

• Custom fields (credit score, funding amount, business type)

• Automatic pipeline movement

• Task reminders and automation

• Lead scoring setup



LEAD AUTOMATIONS

• New lead SMS immediately

• New lead
 immediately

• Follow-up automation (0–14 days)

• Long-term follow-up (30, 60, 90 days)

• Missed call text back

• Re-engagement automation

• Stop automation when lead replies

• Stop automation when appointment booked



APPOINTMENT AUTOMATIONS

• Appointment confirmation SMS/email

• 24-hour reminder

• 2-hour reminder

• No-show follow-up automation

• Reschedule automation



CLIENT AUTOMATIONS

• New client onboarding automation

• Payment reminder automation

• Document request automation

• Monthly check-in automation

• Review request automation

• Referral automation



SYSTEM AUTOMATIONS

•
 leads integration

• Calendar automation

• If/Else workflows

• Tag automation

• Pipeline movement automation

• Task creation automation

• Reporting dashboard setup



IMPORTANT:

When you apply, you must answer this question:



"In GoHighLevel, explain the difference between a Trigger and a Workflow, and explain step-by-step how you would build a lead follow-up automation when a
 lead comes in."



If you cannot answer this, do not apply.



When you apply, send:

1. Screenshots of GoHighLevel workflows you built

2. Pipelines you built before

3. Explain how you would build a lead follow-up system



To confirm you read this job post, start your application with the words:

"GHL Expert"



You can also contact me directly on WhatsApp:
If you cannot show previous GoHighLevel automation work, do not apply.

title: SDR
description:
ABOUT TRUBUILT AI

TruBuilt AI is a Canadian AI automation agency helping contractors, trades businesses, dental offices, and chiropractors automate their lead generation and follow-up systems. We build done-for-you workflows that find qualified leads, reach out automatically, and fill our clients' pipelines — without them lifting a finger.

We are growing fast and looking for a driven, personable sales representative to help us book discovery calls with business owners across Canada.

THE ROLE

This is a commission-based, remote sales position. Your primary job is to call Canadian business owners, introduce TruBuilt AI's services, and book 20-minute discovery/demo calls for our Founder.

You will be provided with:



A proven, tested call script

A lead list of targeted prospects

Full training on our services and workflow

Ongoing support and coaching



This role is perfect for someone who is hungry, self-motivated, and wants unlimited earning potential based on their own effort. Ultimately with the right candidate and some proven success this could work into a base salary + commission full-time position.

WHAT YOU'LL DO



Make outbound calls to Canadian business owners (contractors, electricians, dental offices, chiropractors, landscapers)

Follow a provided script — warm, conversational, not aggressive

Book 20-minute discovery/demo calls on behalf of the Founder

Log all call activity and outcomes in our CRM (HubSpot)

Provide daily call summaries and feedback on common objections

Communicate professionally via
 and messaging tools



COMPENSATION



$150 USD commission per closed/signed client (Founder closes all deals on demo calls)

Future structure being developed: bonus per booked demo once revenue targets are met

Unlimited earning potential — the more you book, the more you earn. With potential to move into a base + commission

Top performers booking 8-10 demos per week with a 30% close rate could earn $1,200-$1,800 USD monthly — with structured bonuses being added as revenue targets are hit



REQUIREMENTS — MUST HAVE



Excellent spoken English — clear, professional, and confident on the phone

Previous call center, sales, or SDR experience — minimum 1 year

Strong technical computer knowledge — comfortable with CRMs, automation tools, AI-driven software

Familiarity with AI and automation concepts — you don't need to build workflows but you must understand and speak confidently about what automation does for businesses

Reliable internet connection and quality headset/microphone

Self-motivated and results-driven — this is commission based, your income reflects your effort

Available during Canadian business hours — primarily 9am-5pm CST (11pm-7am PHT) OR flexible morning PHT hours



NICE TO HAVE



Experience selling SaaS, tech, or digital marketing services

Familiarity with n8n, HubSpot, or similar tools

Experience calling Canadian or North American businesses specifically



WHAT MAKES THIS OPPORTUNITY GREAT



Work fully remote from home

Flexible schedule within Canadian business hours

Be part of a fast-growing AI company at ground level

Direct access to the Founder — you're not a number here

As the company scales, so does your compensation

Ground floor opportunity — top performers will be considered for expanded roles



HOW TO APPLY

Please send the following to 
 with subject line "SDR Application — [Your Name]":



A voice recording (60-90 seconds) introducing yourself and explaining why you're a great fit — this is mandatory, applications without voice recordings will not be considered

Your resume or work history — especially any sales or call center experience

A brief answer to this question: "How would you explain AI automation to a plumber who has never heard of it?"



A NOTE FROM THE FOUNDER

"I'm looking for someone who takes pride in their work, communicates honestly, and wants to grow with a company that's going somewhere. If you're the kind of person who shows up every day, follows through, and genuinely enjoys talking to people — we're going to get along great. This is a ground floor opportunity and I intend to reward the right person well as we grow."

— Greg Bates, Founder | TruBuilt AI

title: Product Builder – Shopify / TeeinBlue (Personalized Gift Products)
description:
We are a fast-growing e-commerce company based in the Netherlands, selling personalized gift products across multiple European markets. Our brands include custom socks, mugs, tiles, and other print-on-demand products. We work with Shopify and TeeinBlue to build and launch new products.



What you'll be doing:

You will be responsible for building new products end-to-end inside Shopify and TeeinBlue. When we share a product idea or a link, you take it from there. That means you find and source the right mockups, present us 3–5 options, and once we pick one, you run with it. You find or create suitable artwork, share your options with us, and after approval you implement everything in TeeinBlue and make the product live-ready.



For some products we already have mockups in place. In those cases your focus is on finding fresh artwork or generating new AI-based designs that fit the product style.



If you're unable to find or create the artwork yourself, you know how to brief our artwork designer and work with them to get it done.



This role is for you if you:

- Are proactive and take ownership — you don't wait for instructions at every step

- Can work independently and move fast

- Have experience with Shopify product setup

- Have worked with TeeinBlue 

- Have a good eye for design and know what works for a gift product store

- Are comfortable sourcing mockups and artwork (free or paid — quality matters more than cost)

- Communicate clearly and keep us updated on progress without us having to ask

-Know how to set up generative AI products in TeeinBlue — you understand how to use AI-generated designs or prompts within the TeeinBlue environment to create personalized product experiences



What a typical workflow looks like:

We send you a product idea or reference link. You research the product, find 3–5 mockup options and share them with us. We choose. You then find 3–5 artwork options and share them. We approve. You build the product in TeeinBlue, set up the personalization correctly, and deliver it ready to go live.



What we're looking for:

Someone who sees a product link and thinks: I've got this. Not someone who needs hand-holding at every step. You are the one who pushes the product forward.



Requirements:

- Proven experience with Shopify

- Experience with TeeinBlue 

- Good taste in product presentation and mockups

- Reliable, fast communicator

- Available for ongoing collaboration (this is not a one-off project)



To apply

Tell us about a product you've built or set up before. What did you do, what tools did you use, and what was the result? Show us you can take ownership.

title: AI Creative / Art Director - Remote
description:
Please follow the application instructions below



About the Role



We’re looking for a forward-thinking Art Director who can transform complex ideas into compelling visual stories. This role combines creative direction, visual storytelling, and AI-powered design, driving high-impact campaigns across film, digital, and social platforms.



You’ll lead the creative vision from concept to execution—ensuring all outputs are visually engaging, strategically aligned, and culturally relevant.



What You’ll Be Doing



Translate Ideas into Visual Concepts

Collaborate with cross-functional teams to bring concepts to life through design and storytelling



Develop Creative Campaigns



Lead the development of big-picture creative concepts for films, social media, and product launches

Create cohesive visual directions that align with brand identity and campaign goals

Contribute to ideation, mood boards, and storyboards



Lead Visual Storytelling



Oversee end-to-end visual execution across video, animation, and digital content

On-Set & Production Direction

Ensure Strategic & Cultural Relevance



Align all creative work with brand strategy, audience insights, and current trends

Stay updated on emerging design, media, and AI innovations

What We’re Looking For



Creative & Design Expertise

Leadership & Collaboration

Mindset



Creative thinker with a passion for innovation and experimentation

Ability to balance creative vision with strategic objectives

Self-motivated and adaptable in a fast-paced environment



Why This Role is Unique



This role is ideal for someone who can blend creativity, strategy, and emerging AI tools—leading the next generation of visual storytelling and creative production.

title: Account Manager / Relationship Manager
description:
At Property Webmasters, we deliver world-class property marketing solutions to clients across the globe. Established in 2006, we have partnered with some of the most prestigious estate agencies and property portals, becoming market leaders in Europe. As we continue expanding worldwide, we are looking for driven individuals to grow with us.



We pride ourselves on attention to detail and continuous improvement. We focus on the small things that make a big difference. If you are not open to feedback and constant growth, this may not be the right fit.



The Role



As an Account Manager / Relationship Manager, you will be responsible for managing client relationships while also leading strategy and briefing work to internal teams. You will act as the bridge between clients and delivery teams, ensuring that ideas are translated into clear, actionable plans and executed to a high standard.



This role is both strategic and operational - you will not just manage accounts, but actively shape campaigns and ensure high-quality delivery.





Key Responsibilities



* Manage and maintain strong relationships with existing clients

* Act as the main point of contact for all client communication

* Understand client goals and develop tailored marketing strategies

* Create clear briefs and delegate work to internal teams (SEO, PPC, design, etc.)

* Ensure all deliverables align with strategy and client expectations

* Review work before delivery to maintain quality standards

* Monitor campaign performance and provide insights and recommendations

* Identify upsell and growth opportunities within accounts

* Ensure client satisfaction and long-term retention

* Support onboarding of new clients and ensure smooth handovers



What We’re Looking For



* Strong communication and relationship management skills

* Proven experience in digital marketing (SEO, PPC, social media, etc.)

* Ability to *think strategically and translate ideas into clear briefs*

* Strong organizational and project management skills

* Analytical mindset with a focus on performance and results

* Confident in managing client expectations and conversations

* Proactive, solution-oriented, and detail-focused

* Team player with a positive and energetic attitude



About You



* Results-driven and accountable

* Strong work ethic with attention to detail

* Open to feedback and continuous improvement

* Ambitious and motivated to grow

* Approachable, confident, and professional



Why Join Us?



* Work with international clients and leading property brands

* Be part of a fast-growing, ambitious company

* Opportunity to grow and develop your career globally

* Collaborative and high-performance team environment

title: Electrical Engineer / Quantity Surveyor - High Voltage (Remote)
description:
About PropFix.ie



PropFix.ie is Ireland's trusted property maintenance specialist, offering comprehensive solutions with years of expertise across the construction and renovation sectors. We transform spaces through our diverse range of services, from handyman solutions and office fit-outs to complete renovations, house extensions, and specialized installations including doors, floors, and partitions.



Our commitment to delivering high-quality property maintenance and electrical solutions has made us a trusted partner for residential, commercial, and industrial clients nationwide. With decades of experience in electrical systems, installations, and maintenance, we take pride in our technical expertise and craftsmanship—ensuring our clients’ properties remain safe, efficient, and fully compliant with modern standards.



Role Overview



We are seeking a skilled and detail-oriented Electrical Engineer to join our team. This role involves electrical design, project coordination, system analysis, and technical documentation. The successful candidate will work closely with project managers, site teams, and clients to ensure accurate planning, safe installations, and seamless execution of all electrical works—from concept design to project completion.



Key Responsibilities

Electrical Engineering & Design



Electrical System Design: Develop, review, and interpret electrical plans, schematics, and load calculations.

Technical Specifications: Prepare detailed specifications, diagrams, SLDs (single-line diagrams), and layout drawings.

Material & Equipment Selection: Determine appropriate electrical components, materials, and equipment required for projects.

Compliance & Standards: Ensure designs meet electrical codes, safety standards, and regulatory requirements.



Project Coordination & Client Management



Site Coordination: Work with contractors, site engineers, and electricians to ensure proper installation and site execution.

Client Communication: Liaise with clients to clarify requirements, provide technical updates, and explain engineering decisions.

Documentation: Prepare project reports, progress updates, testing results, QA/QC records, and risk assessments.

Change Management: Document revisions to electrical plans and update load calculations, cost impacts, and schedules accordingly.



Testing, Maintenance & Quality Control



System Testing: Perform testing, commissioning, and troubleshooting of electrical systems and equipment.

Preventive Maintenance: Evaluate system performance and recommend maintenance schedules or upgrades.

Safety Compliance: Ensure all electrical work follows safety protocols, lock-out/tag-out procedures, and hazard assessments.



Financial Administration & Office Support



Cost Estimation: Prepare electrical cost estimates, material take-offs, and assist in budget planning.

Invoice & Documentation: Support invoicing, procurement coordination, and inventory updates for electrical materials.

Technical Records: Maintain accurate documentation, permits, and electrical certification records.



Required Skills & Experience

Technical Requirements



Electrical Engineering: Proven experience in electrical design, installation supervision, testing, and commissioning.

Codes & Standards: Strong understanding of local electrical codes, NEC/IEC standards, and safety regulations.

Technical Proficiency: Skilled in electrical drafting tools (AutoCAD, Revit MEP, or similar) and testing instruments.

Project Knowledge: Familiarity with construction processes, electrical layouts, and engineering documentation.



Professional Skills



Analytical Ability: Strong problem-solving and technical analysis skills.

Communication: Excellent verbal and written communication for client and contractor coordination.

Organization: Ability to handle multiple projects, documentation, and scheduling tasks efficiently.

Adaptability: Capable of managing both office-based work and technical project duties.



What We Offer



Competitive compensation package

Opportunities to work with clients across Ireland and the UK

Professional development and training programs

Collaborative and supportive remote work environment

Clear career advancement pathways

Exposure to diverse engineering and construction projects

Flexible remote working systems with comprehensive support



Please complete the attached application form and submit it along with your CV:

title: Senior Accountant - US Construction Business
description:
Senior Accountant / Controller (QuickBooks) – Construction & Real Estate



We are an entrepreneurial organization with diverse holdings in real estate development, construction, private investments, and related operating businesses. Our environment is fast-moving, collaborative, and growth-oriented. We are seeking an experienced Senior Accountant / Controller to oversee financial operations, strengthen financial systems, and support ownership in making informed decisions around projects, growth, and capital deployment.



This role is responsible for the financial management of a project-based construction ensuring accurate accounting, job costing, and financial reporting across multiple entities. The ideal candidate combines strong technical accounting expertise with practical experience in construction accounting and QuickBooks, and thrives in a hands-on, entrepreneurial environment.



Key Responsibilities



Oversee day-to-day accounting operations across multiple entities using QuickBooks, ensuring accurate and timely financial reporting.



Manage construction job costing, project budgets, WIP tracking, and cost allocation across multiple projects.



Prepare and analyze monthly financial statements, cash flow forecasts, and project performance reports.



Lead budgeting, forecasting, and financial modeling to support project planning and strategic decisions.



Manage multi-entity accounting, including intercompany transactions, consolidations, and cash management.



Ensure proper revenue recognition, project accounting, and cost tracking for construction and development activities.



Partner with ownership to evaluate new development opportunities, investments, and project feasibility.



Develop and maintain financial controls, processes, and reporting systems to support a growing organization.



Coordinate with external CPAs, tax professionals, lenders, and auditors.



Support draw requests, lender reporting, and capital planning for construction and development projects.



Supervise and mentor accounting staff as the organization grows.



Qualifications



Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field (CPA preferred but not required).



5+ years of accounting experience, preferably in construction, development, or project-based businesses.



Strong proficiency in QuickBooks and job-cost accounting.



Experience with multi-entity accounting and financial reporting.



Strong understanding of construction financials, WIP schedules, and project budgeting.



Highly organized with strong analytical and problem-solving skills.



Comfortable operating in a hands-on, entrepreneurial environment where priorities move quickly.

title: $600–$1,800 USD | US Business Development Associate | Remote | Bonuses

title: $1,500–$3,000 USD Base | US Executive Recruiter | Commission | Remote

title: US Recruiting Sourcer / Talent Researcher – Remote | $400–$600 USD
description:
US Talent Researcher / Recruiting Sourcer – Remote | $400–$600 USD

Discover the professionals leading major construction projects across the United States.

Help identify the Project Managers, Superintendents, and leaders who build hospitals, stadiums, and large commercial developments.



If you enjoy research, solving puzzles, and finding hard-to-locate professionals online, this role will be exciting and rewarding.

You’ll work with a U.S. executive recruiting team that places leadership talent at construction companies across the country.

This role is perfect for someone who enjoys digging deep, uncovering talent, and building organized pipelines of candidates.



Strong performers can grow into Senior Sourcer or full-cycle Recruiter roles over time.



***What You'll Be Doing***

• Research and identify construction professionals across the United States

• Use LinkedIn, ZoomInfo/Apollo, and advanced search techniques to find candidates

• Build structured candidate pipelines for active recruiting projects

• Organize and track talent information inside Google Sheets or CRM

• Conduct basic qualification research (title, location, experience)

• Work closely with recruiters to support open roles and hiring targets



This role is research-driven and detail-focused.



***What Success Looks Like***

Within your first 90 days you will learn how to:

• Day 30: Identify 30–50 qualified professionals per week

• Day 60: Support 8–12 candidate submissions per week

• Day 90: Build consistent talent pipelines for multiple recruiting projects



***Ideal Background***

• Strong internet research skills; organized and detail-oriented

• Curious and persistent when searching for information

• Comfortable working with spreadsheets and online tools

• Strong written English communication



***Helpful but not required***

• Experience sourcing U.S. candidates

• Recruiting or talent research experience

• Familiarity with LinkedIn search or Boolean searches



***Compensation and Growth***

Base salary: $400–$600 USD per month depending on experience

Career path toward Senior Sourcer or full-cycle Recruiter roles



***Work Schedule***

• US Eastern Time schedule (Philippines night shift) • Monday to Friday

• Minimum 50 Mbps internet connection with backup

• Quiet workspace and reliable headset



***How to Apply (Follow Exactly)***

Subject line: SOURCER – [Your Name]

• Include your resume and  a brief recording introducing yourself and highlighting your sourcing experience

• Submit one Boolean string for a Senior Project Manager (construction) and explain it briefly

• Attach a three-company target list (city, role focus, reason for fit)

• Provide a five-line outreach message you would send to a candidate



If you’re ready to build a meaningful career in recruitment, sharpen your research skills, and help shape the teams behind America’s most ambitious construction projects — we want to hear from you.

title: US Sales Development Representative (SDR) – $1,200–$1,800 USD + Bonuses | Long-Term Remote

title: Executive Assistant – Tech, Automation & Operations Support

???? No patient communication or clinical responsibilities



? Required Qualifications

Strong problem-solving skills with the ability to work independently



Highly organized, detail-oriented, and reliable



Tech-savvy with the ability to learn new systems quickly



Experience with WordPress and Go High Level (or similar platforms)

???? Position Details



Fully remote



Part-time to start



Opportunity for increased hours and long-term growth based on performance, reliability, and initiative

title: AI Implementation & Integration Specialist (Software Engineer)
description:
As part of its digital transformation strategy, the company is investing in artificial intelligence and automation technologies to enhance data analysis, client engagement, and internal operational efficiency.



About the Role



We are seeking an AI Implementation & Integration Specialist (Software Engineer) to design and develop AI-powered applications and automation tools that support business operations.



The successful candidate will be responsible for building scalable AI solutions, integrating machine learning systems into existing platforms, and supporting the development of internal technology tools that improve data analysis, client management, and workflow automation.



Key Responsibilities



· Design and develop AI-enabled software applications and internal automation systems.

· Build and deploy machine learning models and AI applications for business data analysis.

· Develop APIs and backend services to integrate AI tools with existing business platforms.

· Implement conversational AI systems, including chatbots or voice-enabled agents.

· Develop data processing pipelines and integrate structured and unstructured data sources.

· Work with business stakeholders to translate operational requirements into technical solutions.

· Monitor system performance and continuously improve deployed AI applications.

· Collaborate with cross-functional teams to implement scalable software solutions



Required Skills and Experience



· Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Software Engineering or related field.

· Experience in software development using programming languages such as Python, JavaScript or similar.

· Experience developing APIs or backend systems using frameworks such as FastAPI, Flask, Node.js or similar.

· Familiarity with machine learning or AI frameworks and tools.

· Experience integrating AI solutions into real-world applications or business systems.

· Understanding of database technologies and data processing workflows.

· Strong analytical, troubleshooting and problem-solving skills.

· Ability to work collaboratively within a team environment



Desirable Skills



· At least 1 year experience with AI automation tools or conversational AI systems.

· Experience working with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure or GCP.

· Knowledge of data pipelines, vector databases or AI model deployment

title: n8n Developer
description:

Key Responsibilities

• Design and develop automated workflows using n8n to connect internal and third-party systems

• Build, test, and maintain integrations with APIs, databases, webhooks, and cloud services

• Identify manual processes that can be streamlined through workflow automation

• Document workflows, processes, and integration architecture for internal use

• Troubleshoot and resolve workflow failures, errors, and performance bottlenecks

• Collaborate with product, engineering, and operations teams to gather requirements

• Monitor live workflows and ensure high availability and reliability

• Stay current with n8n updates, new nodes, and best practices



Requirements

• Proven hands-on experience building workflows in n8n (self-hosted or cloud)

• Strong understanding of REST APIs, webhooks, JSON, and HTTP methods

• Experience integrating tools such as Google Workspace, Slack, HubSpot, Airtable, Notion, or similar SaaS platforms

• Ability to write basic scripts (JavaScript / Python) for custom n8n function nodes

• Familiarity with databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, or MongoDB) and SQL queries

• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

Nice to Have

• Experience working in a remote or distributed team environment

We operate with a team of A-players and are building a business that is scalable, profitable, and relentlessly optimized.



To make that happen, we are looking for a CRO Specialist who does not stop at "good enough."



As a CRO Specialist at Zantriel, you are responsible for the performance of our winning products. You make sure we extract the maximum from our winners by staying focused on conversion rate, AOV, and overall profitability every single day. This is not a supporting role: you work at the core revenue engine of the business.



What you will do:

- Funnel analysis: You analyze funnels end to end and identify exactly where performance breaks down.

- Conversion and AOV optimization: You structurally improve conversion rate and average order value through sharp, deliberate changes.

- Offers, bundles, and pricing: You optimize offers, bundles, and pricing structures to maximize profitability.

- Post-purchase flows: You build and improve post-purchase upsell flows.

- Tooling: You work hands-on in Funnelish and similar tools.

- Data analysis: You go deep on campaign and funnel data to recognize patterns and back decisions with numbers. Testing and implementation: You run tests, draw conclusions, and push improvements live.



When metrics are off, you find out why. When we have a winner, you make sure we get everything out of it.



We are looking for you if:

- You have proven CRO experience and are well past the beginner stage. 

- You have worked with funnel builders like Funnelish or ClickFunnels

- You know your way around e-commerce, with the health niche being a strong plus.

- You understand AOV optimization, conversion rate optimization, upsell and post-purchase flows, and offer structure from the inside out. 



You can write copy that converts, or at minimum you understand what makes copy work.



We are not looking for agencies or freelancers doing this on the side. We want someone who goes all-in and becomes part of the team.



For your information:

- The starting salary for this role is $8 per hour. We start at 40 hours per week, with the possibility to scale up quickly. On top of that, we work performance-based: good work is rewarded well with high bonuses.

- We work from 10:00 to 19:00 UK time.

- Our selection process is strict, with multiple interview rounds and cases. We test whether you are sharp, ambitious, and driven, and whether you are committed to becoming the best in your field.

- We always start with a trial month. After that, we evaluate performance and potential. At Zantriel you can move fast, as long as you take ownership, deliver results, and keep learning. Growth is not a promise here, it is an opportunity you create yourself.

- At Zantriel you get the space, resources, and freedom to become the best version of yourself. We invest in your growth, with courses like Evolve ($1,500/month value) and support in your setup, all aimed at helping you flourish and get the most out of yourself.

- We reinvest into our people to build long-term stability for them and their families.



Fill in this form to apply:

title: Community Engagement Specialist – Real Estate Forums (Reddit & BiggerPockets)
description:
About Us

DealScore is a real estate deal analysis tool that helps house flippers and investors calculate ARV (After Repair Value) and construction costs by zip code. We have a freemium model with a growing user base and we need help getting the word out in the communities where our users spend their time.



The Role

You'll be our voice in online real estate investing communities — primarily Reddit and BiggerPockets. Your job is to monitor relevant threads, provide genuinely helpful answers to investor questions, and naturally introduce DealScore when it's relevant. This is NOT spamming links or copy-pasting sales pitches. Think of it as being the most helpful person in the room who happens to know about a great tool.



What You'll Do Every Day (1–2 hours/day, 5 days/week)

Monitor 3–5 subreddits and BiggerPockets forums for relevant threads using keyword alerts

Draft and post 3–5 thoughtful, authentic replies per day

Post 1 original thread per week (deal analysis, tip, or discussion question)

Track all activity in a shared Google Sheet

Send a weekly summary report every Friday



You'll Create Your Own Accounts

You will create fresh Reddit and BiggerPockets accounts for this role (not your personal accounts). You'll need to build karma and credibility naturally in the first week before engaging on behalf of DealScore. We'll provide a full onboarding playbook with tone guidelines, example replies, and a list of keywords to monitor.



Must-Haves

Strong English writing skills — conversational, not corporate

Familiarity with Reddit (you understand karma, subreddit rules, and community culture)

Ability to write responses that sound like a real person, not a marketer

Self-directed and consistent — you'll work independently with weekly check-ins

Reliable internet and available during US business hours (at least partial overlap with EST)



Nice-to-Haves (Not Required)

Familiarity with real estate investing concepts (ARV, rehab costs, flipping)

Experience with BiggerPockets forums

Previous community management or forum engagement experience

Experience using keyword monitoring tools (F5Bot, etc.)



First Two Weeks

Week 1 is an approval period — you'll draft replies and I'll review before you post. Week 2 shifts to independent posting with spot-checks. Full onboarding playbook provided on Day 1.

Compensation

$300–400/month depending on experience, paid monthly. Bonus opportunity: per-referral bonus for tracked paid signups from your engagement.



To Apply

Please include in your application:

A short paragraph about any experience you have with Reddit or online forums

A sample reply to this thread: "First time flipper — how do I figure out what a house will be worth after I renovate it?"

Your Reddit username if you have one (not required, but helpful)



Note: If you don't know much about real estate investing yet, that's okay — we'll train you. What matters most is your writing quality and understanding of how online communities work.

title: Estimator
description:
Responsibilities includes but are not limited to:

- Assist the BD and Sales teams with quote preparation and any other ad hoc work that may arise.

1. Cost Estimation and Proposal Assistance: 

o Create project limits via Google Earth Pro, take a screenshot, save a copy in the designated folder and paste it in the RFP form for subcontractor, if needed.

o Requesting estimated to subcontractor

o Assist in researching travel costs (airfare, hotel, land travel, labor, per diem)

o Support the preparation and formatting of detailed cost estimates, proposals, and vendor bids.

o Help review estimates for accuracy, completeness, and adherence to company pricing strategies.

o Analyze project documents: Review blueprints, site plans, specifications, and other documents to understand the full scope of the project.

Stay updated on market trends: Monitor current market prices for labor rates, and other relevant costs to ensure estimates are competitive and realistic. Check other platform that we can bid on.



2. Bidding and Proposal Preparation

1. Gather quotes: Obtain and compare quotes from subcontractors, suppliers, and vendors to secure the best prices.

2. Prepare bids and proposals: Compile all cost data and project information into a detailed, professional, and competitive bid package.

3. Collaborate with teams: Work closely with operations and sales/estimator teams to ensure the estimate aligns with project goals and timelines.

4. Present estimates: Clearly communicate the estimate to clients, management, and other stakeholders, explaining the basis of the costs and offering recommendations for cost-saving options.

5. Monitor bid progress: Track the bid progress. Check back with client’s timeline and fees submitted accordingly.

• Prepare reports and maintain databases: Keep a detailed and organized database of historical cost data, quotes, and project information to improve the accuracy of future estimates via Zoho and sales dashboard excel sheet. Coordination with the team for the sales updates and progress.



3. Project Monitoring and Management

• Process change orders(if needed): Re-evaluate and adjust estimates as needed to account for any changes in the project scope or client requests. Change order line items will be coming from Operations

• Essential Skills and Qualifications: Strong mathematical and analytical skills: The ability to perform complex calculations and analyze large sets of data is fundamental.

• Attention to detail: Even minor miscalculations can have a significant impact on the project's bottom line.

• Proficiency with software: Expertise in standard office programs like Microsoft Excel, Word and PDF software are essential. use CRM and other related software program is a plus.

• Excellent communication and negotiation skills: The role requires frequent interaction with clients, vendors, and team members. 

• Organizational and time management skills: Estimators often work on multiple projects simultaneously and must meet strict deadlines.

• Industry knowledge: A deep understanding of site plans, civil work, constructions staking, and other market segments and Asana systems is crucial.



4. Customer Relationship Management(CRM): 

• Track Lead Status: Knowing exactly where a bid stands in the sales funnel.

• Historical Data: Looking back at past wins or losses to see if their margins are consistently too high or too low.

• Communication Log: Ensuring that every change order or client request is documented so there are no "he-said, she-said" disputes later.

• Automation: Using the CRM to send follow-up reminders, ensuring bids don't "go cold" after submission.



5. Campaign Deployment & Lead Intelligence

• Outreach Execution: Facilitate the execution of targeted direct mail and digital outreach initiatives. 

• Lead Qualification: You will be responsible for monitoring multi-channel recipient engagement—analyzing click-through rates and interaction metrics—to identify high-intent prospects. By maintaining rigorous oversight of these analytics, you will qualify and transition high-interest leads to the Sales team for timely follow-up, ensuring a seamless handoff within the business development pipeline.

title: Real Estate Cold Caller
description:
Job Description:

We are a US-based real estate investment company looking for a reliable, motivated Virtual Assistant to make outbound cold calls to property owners. Your goal is to identify homeowners who are interested in selling their property and set appointments for our acquisitions team.

This is a long-term position for the right person. We provide the call script, lead lists, dialer software, and training. No prior real estate experience required, but it is a plus.

Responsibilities:



Make 200+ outbound calls per day using a provided dialer

Follow the provided cold calling script to identify motivated sellers

Qualify leads by asking about property condition, motivation, timeline, and price expectations

Log every call result accurately in our tracking spreadsheet or CRM

Schedule follow-up calls with warm and hot leads

Set appointments for our acquisitions team with qualified sellers

Leave professional voi
s when owners don't answer

Provide a daily summary report of calls made, leads generated, and appointments set



Requirements:



Excellent English speaking skills with clear pronunciation

Reliable internet connection (minimum 10 Mbps) and a quiet workspace

Own headset with noise cancellation

A computer capable of running a web-based dialer

Available to work during US business hours (flexible on timezone, but must overlap with 9 AM - 5 PM EST)

Comfortable making high-volume outbound calls and handling rejection

Honest, dependable, and detail-oriented

Previous experience in cold calling, telemarketing, or customer service is a plus



Nice to Have (Not Required):



Experience in real estate wholesaling or cold calling

Familiarity with CRMs (Podio, REI BlackBook, Follow Up Boss, etc.)

Experience with dialers (Batch Dialer, Mojo, PhoneBurner)

Skip tracing experience (PropStream, BatchLeads)



Compensation & Schedule:



Pay: $3/hour USD (paid weekly via Wise, PayPal, or direct deposit)

Schedule: Full-time (40 hrs/week) or Part-time (20 hrs/week) available

Hours: Must overlap with US business hours

Bonuses: Performance bonuses available for leads that convert to closed deals

Long-term position with potential for raises based on performance



What We Provide:



Full training on our process and script

Daily lead lists (you never have to source your own leads)

Dialer software (no cost to you)

CRM / tracking spreadsheet access

Ongoing coaching and support



How to Apply:

Please send a voice recording (1-2 minutes) of yourself reading the following paragraph:

"Hi, my name is [Your Name]. I'm a virtual assistant with experience in outbound calling. I'm calling today because I noticed you own a property at 123 Main Street. I work with a local real estate company, and we're interested in making you a fair cash offer. Would you be open to hearing what we could offer? There's no obligation at all."

Also include: your relevant experience, available hours and timezone, internet speed (screenshot from speedtest.net), and why you're interested in this position.

title: Online ESL Instructor
description:
Join Our Mission:



At Everest English School, our mission is to open up a world of opportunities for young learners. Unlike English education, which often focuses on test-driven learning, heavy on conventional grammar and translation, we are dedicated to equipping students with practical English communication skills. We bridge the gap between traditional education and the essential skills needed for global interactions.



We are seeking experienced and adaptable Online ESL (English as a Second Language) Instructors to teach Japanese students from Grade 1 to Grade 12. As our company continues to grow and innovate, we are entering a dynamic phase where teaching methods may evolve. Therefore, we value instructors who are open to ongoing training and flexible in adapting their instructional approaches. You will play a vital role in supporting students’ language development while helping shape the future of our learning programs.



Responsibilities:

Teach English to Japanese elementary, junior high, and high school students (ages 6–18) in a one-on-one online format

Deliver engaging, age-appropriate lessons tailored to each student’s needs and proficiency level

Adapt teaching strategies based on feedback, training, and evolving curriculum standards

Monitor student progress and provide regular feedback to both students and parents

Participate in training sessions and tea
etings to stay updated on instructional changes

Maintain accurate lesson records and communicate proactively with support staff



Qualifications:

Native or Near-Native English fluency with no requirement for Japanese.

Bachelor’s degree required (preferably in Education, English, or a related field)

TESOL, TEFL, or CELTA certification strongly preferred

Minimum of 2 years of teaching or tutoring experience, preferably with children and/or teens

Experience teaching Japanese students is a strong plus

Ability to deliver dynamic lessons and manage classroom behavior in a virtual setting

Openness to learning and adapting teaching methods through training and feedback

Proficiency with online teaching tools; reliable internet, headset, and quiet workspace required



Working Hours:

Each workday will include at least two 25-minute lessons (totaling an hour or more per day).

The expected monthly working hours are approximately 24 hours.

Lessons can be scheduled between 5:00 AM and 11:00 PM (JST).

Priority will be given to those who can teach during weekday mornings and on weekends.



Compensation:

Competitive hourly rate based on experience, qualifications, and performance



If you are interested, we kindly ask you to submit the following two items.

Please be aware that missing either item will result in an incomplete application.

1.Your most recent resume

2. 1-minute self-introduction video in English



This will be an outsourcing (independent contractor) agreement, not a part-time employment contract.

title: Windows Server / Hyper-V Virtualization Specialist – Server Optimization Project
description:
Company:

Injazat Information Technology – Saudi Arabia

We develop ERP, HR, Payroll, and Real Estate SaaS systems and run our infrastructure on Windows Server and Hyper-V.



Job Description



We are looking for an experienced Windows Server and Hyper-V specialist to review and optimize our virtualization server. The server is already running multiple virtual machines, but we believe the system is not configured for maximum performance and efficiency.



This is initially a project-based job to review, optimize, and document the server environment. If the work is successful, this may turn into long-term part-time support.



Current Environment

Huawei Server

Windows Server 2022 Standard

Hyper-V

256 GB RAM

Dual Intel Xeon processors

Multiple Virtual Machines

SQL Server on some VMs

TSPlus Remote Access

Backup system in place

Scope of Work



The specialist will be responsible for:



Server Review

Review Hyper-V configuration

Review virtual machine CPU allocation

Review virtual machine memory allocation

Review disk and storage configuration

Review virtual network configuration

Review backup strategy

Review checkpoints/snapshots usage

Review Windows Server performance settings

Review SQL Server performance (if applicable)

Review remote access performance (TSPlus / RDP)

Optimization

Optimize VM CPU and memory allocation

Configure Dynamic Memory where appropriate

Optimize disk layout and VM storage

Configure antivirus exclusions for Hyper-V

Improve server and VM performance

Configure proper backup and restore procedures

Set up monitoring and performance tracking

Recommend best practices for Hyper-V environment

Ensure system stability and reliability

Documentation (Very Important)



The specialist must prepare documentation including:



Server architecture

VM allocation plan

Storage layout

Backup procedure

Restore procedure

Disaster recovery plan

Network layout

Performance recommendations

Maintenance checklist

Required Skills

Windows Server 2019 / 2022

Hyper-V

Virtual Machine performance tuning

Storage configuration

Backup systems

Networking

Remote Desktop / TSPlus

SQL Server basics

PowerShell (preferred)

System documentation

How to Apply



Please include the following in your application:



Your experience with Windows Server and Hyper-V

Number of servers you have configured or optimized

Example of similar project you worked on

Your hourly rate or project rate

Availability to start



If a Hyper-V server has 256 GB RAM and 5 virtual machines, how would you allocate memory and CPU to the VMs to maximize performance and stability?

title: LinkedIn Ghostwriter (Employee Advocacy Program)
description:
We’re looking for a LinkedIn ghostwriter to support our employee advocacy program and help bring multiple voices from our team to life:  authentically, consistently, and in a very non-corporate way.

You’ll work closely with our Brand Manager and support 8 profiles across the business, each with a distinct perspective and role:

- CEO

- Head of Ops

- Head of Marketing

- Partnerships Manager

- Digital PR Manager

- Customer Success Manager

- 2× Customer Support Specialists



The goal is simple: build brand awareness, clearly position our expertise and services, and humanise the brand by showing the people and work behind the scenes.



What you’ll be doing

- Ghostwriting LinkedIn posts for senior leadership and key tea
mbers

- Helping shape different perspectives, tones of voice, and points of view (no copy-paste personalities)

- Translating real work, opinions, and experiences into engaging LinkedIn content

- Supporting idea generation and brainstorming with tea
mbers who also write their own posts

- The answer to the secret question is that "Good LinkedIn content sounds human, not corporate."



Content volume

- Top management (CEO and Head of Ops): ~5 posts per person per week (10 posts total)

- Everyone else: ~2 posts per person per week (12 posts total)

- Additional support with brainstorming post ideas for employees creating their own content

Total: ~22 LinkedIn posts per week



What we’re aiming for

- Increased brand awareness on LinkedIn

- Clearer positioning of our expertise and services

- More behind-the-scenes content that builds credibility and trust

- Content that sounds human, opinionated, and real - not corporate or over-polished



Nice-to-haves

- Strong understanding of LinkedIn as a platform (and how people actually engage there: formats, attention, behaviour, not just posting);

- An eye for trends, 
s, and internet-native formats;

- An eye for good design and familiarity with Canva (basic visuals, carousels, simple layouts) - you will work closely with our designer;

- Proven experience ghostwriting for founders, leaders, or subject-matter experts;

- Ability to adapt tone of voice across different roles and personalities;

- Knows how to make B2B content feel relatable, not boring

- Proactive with hooks, angles, and content ideas;

- Familiarity with Trello for content planning and collaboration.



What will make you stand out even more:

- Solid understanding of digital marketing, including link building and customer service;

- Experience creating lead magnets (guides, checklists, simple resources);

- Hands-on experience working on employee advocacy programs: ghostwriting and shaping content for several people within the same company, without making everyone sound the same.



Working style

- Collaborative and async-friendly

- Direct access to our Brand Manager for context, feedback, and direction

- Focus on quality, clarity, and consistency.



Important Information

- Employment Type: Full-time, remote

- Core Working Hours: 8 AM - 4 PM BST/GMT

- Pay: £7 per hour



Hiring Process:

- Submit your application here: 

- Please note: applications submitted through OnlineJobs messaging will not be considered

- Standout applicants will be invited to complete a recorded video interview

- Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a video call with our hiring team



If you enjoy building personal brands, shaping sharp LinkedIn content, and making B2B feel human again, we’d love to hear from you.

title: GoHighLevel Expert – AI Video Automation & Social Media Lead Generation
description:
A fast-growing Dubai-based AI technology company is hiring a highly skilled GoHighLevel (GHL) specialist who knows the platform inside out. This is not an entry-level role. We need someone who has already built complex GHL workflows, understands sub-account architecture deeply, and can own the full automation pipeline from video production through to booked appointments.

You will be working on cutting-edge AI influencer video automation — producing, scheduling, and distributing content across multiple client sub-accounts — and then closing the loop by automating lead capture, engagement, nurturing, and calendar booking from social media responses.



What You'll Be Responsible For

GHL Platform Management



Build and manage complex multi-client sub-account structures

Configure and maintain GHL media libraries across sub-accounts

Set up and troubleshoot social media channel integrations per sub-account

Build, test, and maintain advanced automation workflows, pipelines, and triggers



AI Video Production & Automation



Work with AI video generation tools to produce consistent, high-quality AI influencer videos

Build automated systems that produce videos at scale across different verticals and client niches

Automatically push finished videos into the correct GHL sub-account media libraries

Auto-schedule video posts to the correct social media channels per client sub-account



Social Media Response Automation



Set up automated capture of comments, DMs, and reactions from social media posts

Build GHL workflows that auto-respond to social media engagement

Create lead warming sequences triggered by social media interactions



Lead Generation, Qualification & Booking



Build end-to-end funnels that take a social media lead from first touch to qualified and booked

Configure AI-powered or rule-based lead qualification logic inside GHL

Automate appointment booking directly into GHL calendars

Set up follow-up and no-show sequences





You Must Have



Minimum 2 years hands-on GHL experience — sub-accounts, workflows, pipelines, calendars, media library, social planner

Proven experience building multi-client or agency-level GHL setups

Experience with AI video tools (e.g. HeyGen, Synthesia, RunwayML, Kling, or similar)

Experience building social media automation — not just scheduling, but response capture and auto-reply

Strong understanding of lead nurturing and qualification automation

Ability to work independently, document your work, and manage multiple client setups simultaneously

Reliable internet connection and ability to work within UAE business hours (or overlap)





Nice to Have



Experience with Zapier, Make (Integromat), or n8n for bridging external tools into GHL

Experience with AI chatbot or conversational AI setup inside GHL

Background in real estate, hospitality, or professional services verticals

Video editing or prompt engineering skills for AI video generation





What We Offer



Competitive salary (based on experience — please state your expected monthly rate in USD in your application)

Fully remote, work-from-home position

Long-term stable role with a growing AI company

Opportunity to work on genuinely innovative AI automation at scale

Clear scope with room to grow into a senior systems role





How to Apply

Send your application with the following:



A brief summary of your GHL experience (sub-accounts managed, workflows built)

Examples or screenshots of GHL automations you have built (pipelines, social planner, media library usage)

Any AI video tools you have used and what you produced with them

Your expected monthly rate in USD

Your available start date



Applications without GHL examples will not be considered.
