title: Marketing Director for Streetwear Brand
description:
ABOUT KORELIMITED



KORELIMITED is a culture-driven fashion brand celebrating Korean heritage through elevated design and storytelling. We exist at the intersection of identity, community, and modern streetwear — creating pieces that honor culture while shaping the future of it.



As we continue expanding globally, we are seeking a strategic and culturally fluent marketing director to lead brand growth, storytelling, and community expansion at the highest level.





OVERVIEW

The Marketing Director will lead the overall marketing vision and execution for KORELIMITED. This role requires both strategic leadership and hands-on execution. You will own brand positioning, growth strategy, campaign development, influencer partnerships, community building, and performance marketing.



You should deeply understand culture-driven brands, fashion marketing, and digital ecosystems — especially how storytelling, identity, and community translate into measurable growth.



This role is ideal for someone who understands that KORELIMITED is not just apparel — it’s representation.





RESPONSIBILITIES

Brand Strategy & Positioning

- Identify and evolve KORELIMITED’s brand narrative and voice

- Lead seasonal campaign strategy and product storytelling

- Ensure brand consistency across all touchpoints (social,
, web, retail, events)



Growth & Performance Marketing

- Develop and execute paid acquisition strategy (Meta, TikTok, Google, etc.)

- Oversee
, SMS, and retention marketing programs

- Drive customer acquisition, LTV growth, and conversion rate optimization

- Manage marketing budget allocation and performance reporting

- Rigorous A/B testing



Influencer & Community Marketing

- Lead and oversee influencer seeding, partnerships, and ambassador programs

- Build authentic relationships within Korean-American and global Korean communities

- Oversee creator collaborations and campaign activations

- Expand community initiatives and cultural partnerships



Content & Social Strategy

- Guide content strategy across Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and emerging platforms

- Oversee campaign creative direction alongside internal and external teams

- Identify culturally relevant trends and moments for brand participation



Team Leadership

- Build and manage internal marketing team

- Collaborate closely with design, e-commerce, and operations teams

- Manage external agencies, freelancers, and partners



Requirements

- 5+ years of experience in fashion, streetwear, or culture-driven brands

title: Meta Ads Account Manager
description:
ABOUT KORELIMITED

KORELIMITED is a culture-driven fashion brand celebrating Korean heritage through elevated design and storytelling. We exist at the intersection of identity, community, and modern streetwear — creating pieces that honor culture while shaping the future of it.



As we scale our global footprint, we are looking for a data-driven Meta Ads Account Manager to own our paid social ecosystem. You will be responsible for turning our brand story into a high-growth engine through
 and Instagram advertising.



OVERVIEW

The Meta Ads Account Manager will lead the strategy, execution, and optimization of all paid social campaigns. This is a high-impact role that sits at the intersection of creative strategy and technical performance.



You aren't just pushing buttons in Ads Manager; you are analyzing customer behavior, scaling winning creative, and ensuring KORELIMITED reaches the right audience at the right time. You understand that in streetwear, a high ROAS (Return on Ad Spend) comes from the perfect marriage of "The Math" and "The Magic."



RESPONSIBILITIES

Campaign Management & Scaling

Full-Funnel Strategy: Build and manage Meta ad campaigns across the entire customer journey: Prospecting (TOF), Retargeting (MOF/BOF), and Retention/LTV.



Budget Oversight: Manage and scale daily/monthly spend to hit aggressive revenue targets while maintaining efficiency (ROAS/MER).



Technical Setup: Ensure pixel health, Conversions API (CAPI) stability, and accurate catalog management for Advantage+ Shopping Campaigns (ASC).



Creative Strategy & Testing

Creative Directives: Collaborate with the content team to request high-performance assets (UGC, motion graphics, lifestyle photography) based on data-driven insights.



Rigorous A/B Testing: Lead a "test and learn" culture—testing hooks, headlines, formats (Reels vs. Static), and landing pages to constantly lower CAC (Customer Acquisition Cost).



Creative Analysis: Deep-dive into creative metrics (Hook Rate, Hold Rate, CTR) to understand why an ad is winning or losing.



Data & Reporting

Performance Reporting: Provide weekly and monthly reports on key metrics including Spend, Revenue, ROAS, CPA, and New Customer Acquisition.



Audience Insight: Build and refine Lookalike (LAL) audiences and high-intent interest stacks relevant to the streetwear and Asian-American cultural niche.



REQUIREMENTS

3+ years of experience specifically in Meta Ads/Media Buying for an E-commerce/D2C brand (Streetwear/Fashion experience is a major plus).



Proven Track Record: Experience managing 6-figure monthly budgets with a history of scaling brands profitably.



Analytical Mindset: You love spreadsheets as much as you love streetwear. You can look at raw data and turn it into an actionable strategy.



Technical Proficiency: Expert knowledge of Meta Business Suite, Shopify, and attribution tools (e.g., Triple Whale or GA4).



In-Office: This role is based at our HQ to ensure tight collaboration with the design and marketing teams.

title: Merchandise Administration Coordinator
description:
Merchandise Administration Coordinator

Global headwear brand — Remote (must work 9am–5p
lbourne / AEST Mon–Fri)

 Pay: $245 USD per week (paid weekly)

Contract: Ongoing (we’re looking for someone long-term who can grow into more senior merchandising/admin responsibilities).

Start: ASAP / by mutual agreement.



Love merchandising, data and making product launches run smoothly? We’re looking for a tidy-minded merch admin who lives in PLM, gets inventory reporting, and has real-world experience in fashion/accessories/footwear. This is a hands-on, highly visible role — you’ll sit at the intersection of Product, Sales, Customer Service and Inventory and help keep the engine running.



Why this role is great

- Work with a global headwear brand and play a key role in product launches and program execution.

- Remote, but fully aligned to Melbourne hours (so you’re paid to collaborate with senior merchandisers and cross-functional teams in real time).

- Weekly pay, stable ongoing contract — ideal for merch admins who want reliable hours and a clear scope of work.



What you’ll own

- PLM data creation & maintenance — create and manage product MIDs/attributes, season/collection fields, program and custom MIDs, and ensure data architecture supports commercial reporting and forecasting.

- Order form & program setup — develop accurate order forms for launches, confirm deadlines, and ensure global MIDs are created in advance of programs.

- Inventory & sales reporting — produce weekly SOH, NOS/ATP, residual stock, sell-through and weeks-cover reporting; support wholesale and B2B reporting.

- Global range & program support — manage cancelled MIDs/program communications, post program wrap-ups, assist with global launches and forecasts.

- Cross-team collaboration — liaise with Product, Sourcing, Sales, Customer Service and Master Data teams to keep everyone aligned.

- Continuous improvement — spot data gaps, propose fixes, and improve the PLM/master data setup for smoother reporting and fewer exceptions.



What is a Product MID (short and useful)

A product MID — short for Material ID (also called Master Item ID or Style ID) — is the single, system-level identifier for a product family in your PLM/ERP.



- It’s the master record for a style or concept; individual SKUs/barcodes are created from that master.

- Typical MID fields: season, collection, product name/description, category/family, colour range, size range, composition/materials, BOM/components, cost, vendor/sourcing info, HS code/GTIN, images, and launch + sales end dates.

- Why it matters: the MID is the single source of truth for launches, costing, customs/program tracking, ordering and reporting. Clean MIDs = fewer exceptions, faster launches, and reliable inventory & sell-through reporting.



What we need from you (must-haves):

- PLM experience — essential. You’ve used PLM day-to-day (MID creation, attribute input, order form creation).

- Fashion / accessories / footwear experience — essential. You’ve worked in retail/wholesale merchandising or product admin for apparel, footwear or accessories.

- Strong Excel and data skills. Comfortable with data entry, cleanups, pivot tables and basic reporting.

- Excellent English communication. You’ll be collaborating heavily with Australia-based teams.

- Organised, accurate, and deadline-driven. You manage high volumes of product data without dropping the ball.

- Availability: Must be available 9:00am–5:00p
lbourne time (AEST/AEDT) Mon–Fri.



Nice-to-haves:

- SAP experience highly regarded — not essential, but a big plus.

- Experience with BI/HANA or other reporting tools.

- Knowledge of master data best-practices and product lifecycle.

- Previous work with global program launches and sourcing teams.



What success looks like (first 3 months):

- PLM inputs for new programs and customs are timely and accurate.

- Order forms and program deadlines are consistently correct and shared on time.

- Weekly inventory and sell-through reports delivered on schedule, with clear, actionable commentary.

- Fewer data exceptions and faster program wrap-ups thanks to cleaner master data.



How to apply (please be concise)



1. When you apply, send:

- Short cover note (2–4 sentences): why you’re a fit and confirm you can work 9am–5p
lbourne time.

- CV with recent merch/admin roles highlighted.

- Brief PLM summary (system name, how long you used it, and 3 core PLM tasks you owned).

- Example/report: a short description (or a redacted sample) of an inventory or sell-through report you created.



2. Screening questions (answer these in your application):

- Name the PLM system(s) you’ve used, years of experience, and the top 3 PLM tasks you owned.

- Do you have any SAP experience? If yes, describe briefly.

- Confirm you can work 9am–5p
lbourne time.

- Are you comfortable with the weekly pay of $245 USD/week?

title: ***URGENT HIRING! Amazon & Walmart VA - Full Training Provided***
description:
Job Title: Amazon & Walmart Virtual Assistant

Type of Employment: Full-Time & Long Term

Salary: $
per month depending on the experience. This is the starting point.

Location: Permanent WFH



About Us:

At our company, we believe in the power of diverse talents coming together to create something extraordinary.



This is very different from any other job post that you see here. It is unique, has lots of growth opportunities, and potential to make lots of money! As we continue to grow and evolve, we are looking for a versatile and adaptable tea
mber to join us. If you're a self-starter, a quick learner, and someone who thrives in a dynamic environment, we want to hear from you.



We’re looking to develop future leaders that would be equipped with responsibilities in the future. We’re going to invest a considerable amount of our time and resources into your education and we will walk alongside you as much as it takes to ensure your professional success. So, please read this job description fully and very carefully if you want to get this job. It might be the whole CAREER OPPORTUNITY for you! A long-term, stable, and lasting job with tons of growth potential!



Job Description:

As an Amazon VA and a Dynamic Tea
mber, you will play a key role in supporting various aspects of our organization. While the specific responsibilities may evolve based on your skills and interests, you can expect to be involved in a range of tasks across different departments. This is an excellent opportunity for someone open to exploring and contributing to various areas within our company.



Responsibilities:

Collaboration:

- Work closely with tea
mbers from different departments on diverse projects.

- Contribute ideas and solutions to challenges that may arise across the organization.

Learning and Development:

- Embrace opportunities for learning and skill development across different areas of the business.

- Stay informed about industry trends and best practices.

Adaptability:

- Be ready to take on new tasks and responsibilities as the needs of the company evolve.

- Learn quickly and adapt to changing priorities in a fast-paced environment.

Problem-Solving:

- Tackle challenges with a positive and proactive mindset.

- Collaborate with colleagues to find innovative solutions to various problems.

Support:

- Provide support to different teams as needed, including administrative tasks and project assistance.

- Assist with day-to-day operations to ensure the smooth running of the organization.



Qualifications:

- A thirst for learning and a passion for personal and professional growth.

- Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

- Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

- Eagerness to learn and take on new challenges.

- Flexibility and adaptability in a dynamic work environment.

- Familiarity with Excel/Google Sheets for data analysis and inventory tracking.



Trial Period:

Before full employment, there will be a four-week probation period (trial) during which we will determine compatibility. You will receive $100 per week during this period. If both parties agree it's a good fit, full-time employment will be offered.



Training:

title: ***URGENT HIRING! Customer Service Representative for Amazon FBA and Walmart WFS - Full Training Provided***
description:
Job Title: Customer Service Representative



As a Customer Service representative, you will be responsible for providing exceptional customer service and support to our clients through phone and non-phone interactions. You will serve as a vital link between our company and our customers, addressing inquiries, resolving issues, and ensuring a positive customer experience. This role is critical to maintaining and enhancing our reputation for excellent customer service.



Key Responsibilities:

1. Phone and
 Customer Support: Handle calls and
s from customers with professionalism and courtesy, actively listening to their concerns and providing solutions or information.

2. Issue Resolution: Investigate and resolve customer inquiries, complaints, or issues efficiently, striving for a first-call resolution whenever possible.

3. Product Knowledge: Develop in-depth knowledge of our products or services to provide accurate information and guidance to customers.

4. Documentation: Maintain detailed and accurate records of customer interactions, including the nature of the inquiry and the steps taken to resolve it.

5. Customer Education: Offer guidance, instructions, and information to customers to help them make informed decisions and use our products effectively.

6. Upselling and Cross-Selling: Identify opportunities to promote additional products or services to customers and achieve upselling and cross-selling targets.

7. Quality Assurance: Ensure that all interactions meet or exceed company standards for quality, professionalism, and customer satisfaction.

8. Adherence to Policies: Follow company policies and procedures, especially in cases of customer returns, refunds, or warranty claims.

9. Team Collaboration: Work closely with other tea ---------- mbers and departments to address complex customer issues and provide comprehensive solutions.

10. Feedback Loop: Provide feedback and insights to the management team regarding recurring customer issues, potential improvements, and market trends.

11. Adhoc: If there are not many calls, help with research and ad-hoc tasks



Qualifications:

- Previous experience in customer service (minimum 2 years).

- Excellent verbal and written communication skills.

- Active listening and empathy in dealing with customer inquiries.

- Strong problem-solving abilities and patience.

- Ability to adapt to changing customer needs and business requirements.

- Willingness to work flexible hours, including evenings, weekends, and holidays as required.



Attributes:

- Strong customer focus and dedication to delivering exceptional service.

- Ability to remain calm under pressure and handle difficult or upset customers with professionalism.

- Positive attitude, reliability, and a willingness to go the extra mile to ensure customer satisfaction.

- Strong interpersonal and teamwork skills.

- Adaptability and the ability to learn quickly and apply new knowledge to support customer needs.



In this role, you will play a crucial part in ensuring our customers receive the support they need, which contributes to our company's success and growth. If you are passionate about providing exceptional customer service and enjoy resolving customer inquiries via phone, we encourage you to apply for the position of Customer Service Phone Support. Join our team and help us maintain our commitment to customer satisfaction.





Other Details (MUST READ):



This is not a regular job post for you just to make some money and for me to get a “virtual assistant”. This is very different. I am not looking for just “another VA”, I am looking for somebody who always strives for excellence, pushes for more, and never settles for mediocrity. I am looking for a reliable teammate to build the last and long-term relationship with, and to grow and make money together. I am looking for someone who can step into bigger shoes, try new things, and assume meaningful responsibilities! This is a CAREER OPPORTUNITY, there will be many growth opportunities, for a salary increase and bonuses! I truly believe in integrity and fairness, so I always will be more than happy to reward outstanding work. Though you will start with just a few responsibilities and lower pay, later on, it will ultimately be up to you to d ---------- whether you want to widen your set of responsibilities and increase the pay accordingly!



I recognize nothing but excellence. Please DO NOT apply for this job post if you are okay with average, and want to “coast”. I expect your full effort in anything, whether it is just sending a simple
 or something more complex. My expectations are high but so are the rewards. Don’t worry though, I am not expecting you to come in and be a superstar from the first Day. I will provide sufficient training and there will be plenty of opportunities to ask questions and to clarify things, and I would be very happy to go through everything and anything. I expect some mistakes and a learning curve in the beginning, it is fine as everybody makes them. As long as you learn from them and never repeat the same mistake twice! Once you get some time and practice, I expect you to be excellent at it and always over-deliver. I do not micro-manage and won’t be a crazy “boss”. I just give you the job and expect excellent results. Anything else outside of it is not my business (how exactly you have done it, when etc). At the end of the day, I want you to truly be able to say that you’ve realized your potential.



I believe in fair compensation and creating an environment where people can be successful. At the same time, I don’t want people that need a lot of hand-holding. I expect that the people we hire can hit the ground running and start making an impact immediately.



I am very reasonable, fair, and flexible. More than happy to provide vacation time, sick days off, bonuses, flexible schedules, really anything, as long it makes sense. Nobody takes advantage of anybody. As long as the job gets done at the best level, and everything is fair to everyone, I am more than happy to discuss anything. I am also more than happy to be wrong, because we are not always right, and we take our mistakes very seriously too. So there will be plenty of room for discussing this type of thing.



This is a great opportunity to build the whole career! As I mentioned there will be plenty of opportunities to grow, to learn new skills, to get rewarded and even to get management positions! You will be given meaningful responsibilities as I will be hiring more people and growing a bigger team! It will ultimately be up to you to d
, how much work you want to put in, how hard to try, and how far to grow! Even the sky is not the limit! I can’t wait to start working together with you! I can’t wait to see the leader you will become.



If you are interested and think this is for you then please apply to this message by having your subject line as "Never Settle for Mediocrity” and then tell me about yourself. Also, answer ALL of the following questions:

s)? If yes, specify the details.

title: Job Title: AI Voice Agent Specialist (Retell AI)
description:
Hello,



I’m looking for an AI Voice Agent specialist to help me build and scale voice automation systems for service-based businesses.



I run an Australian digital marketing agency with 200+ active clients, primarily in the trades (plumbers, electricians, roofers, etc).

You can view our business here: 



Objective

We are building systems that:

 • Answer missed calls 

 • Capture key job details 

 • Turn enquiries into qualified leads automatically 

This role will focus on building scalable, reusable AI voice agent systems that can be deployed across multiple businesses.



Responsibilities

 • Build and refine templated AI voice agents using Retell AI 

 • Create systems that are easily adaptable across different businesses and use cases 

 • Improve conversation flows (lead capture, FAQs, booking logic, etc.) 

 • Integrate with tools like Zapier, webhooks, and SMS platforms 

 • Troubleshoot and optimise performance post-launch 

 • Provide strategic input on how we can improve and expand the product 



What This Role Offers

 • Work across 200+ real client deployments 

 • Flexible working hours to suit your lifestyle and schedule 

 • Be part of building a scalable productised service 

 • Ongoing, consistent work with room to grow 

 • Opportunity to shape the system from an early stage 



Requirements

 • Proven experience with Retell AI (or similar voice agent platforms) 

 • Strong understanding of: 

 Conversation design 

 Prompting / flow logic 

 API/webhook integrations 

 • Experience with Zapier or similar automation tools (preferred) 

 • Strong problem-solving ability (debugging flows, handling edge cases) 

 • Good communication and availability during business hours (WhatsApp) 



Not a Fit If

 • You’ve only done basic chatbot work 

 • You don’t have hands-on experience with voice agents 

 • You prefer one-off tasks rather than ongoing system building 



Application Requirements

At the very top of your application, write this exact sentence:

“I follow instructions carefully and enjoy improving systems.”

Then include:

 • Your weekly availability (days + hours) 

 • Examples of Retell AI (or similar) work 

 • Any relevant builds, demos, or case studies 

 • Any questions you have about the role 

 

I’m looking for someone to work closely with long-term and help build something valuable.



Looking forward to hearing from you.



Tim

title: High-Growth Video Strategist & Editor (US Market | Viral Logic | AI-Savy)
description:

- AI-First Culture: We don't use AI to replace you; we use AI to empower you. You’ll have the freedom to experiment with the latest tools to stay ahead of the curve.

1. Send portfolio (Specifically TikTok/Reels/Shorts).

2. Mandatory: List US accounts worked with and performance data.

3. AI Task: Briefly explain your favorite AI tool and how it helps optimize performance.

4. Secret Code: Start application with the phrase "Mastering the Growth".

title: Senior Interior Designer
description:
Senior Interior Designer - Philippines 



Australian Business hours - Mon to Fri, 9am - 5pm AEST



Remote Location Philippines



Full time contract - Start asap!



About us: 



We’re authentically different

We get it done

We have a can do attitude

We care

Do they resonate with you? If so, we’d love to hear form you —apply today!



We are one of Australia’s leading providers of commercial furniture, helping businesses of all sizes create productive, stylish and functional work environments. Our purpose is to enable people to do great work.



About the Role:



JasonL Design Studio is seeking a high-calibre Senior Interior Designer (8+ years’ experience). This is a technical, delivery-focused role designed for a professional who can translate high-level workplace strategy into “build-ready” construction sets.



We are looking for a design-led thinker, not just a drafter. You must be a specialist with extensive experience in commercial office design and fit-outs, possessing the ability to interrogate a brief and provide creative solutions. 



Working remotely from the Philippines. You aren’t just an “operator” —you are a designer who understands the “why” behind a floor plan, ensuring every layout is compliant, functional, and aesthetically aligned with the JasonL brand.



Key Responsibilities:



Space Planning & Strategy: Execute rapid, high-efficiency workplace test-fits and furniture layouts adhering to Australian standards for circulation and ergonomics.



Full Construction Documentation: Produce comprehensive, ”tender-ready” packages including:

                    - Demolition and New Partition Plans.

                    - Reflected Ceiling Plans (RCP) with integrated Lighting.

                    - New Power & Data Plans.

                    - Wall and Floor Finishes Plans.



Detailed Joinery Design: Develop manufacture-ready joinery packages (reception desks, kitchenettes, boardroom credenzas, storage walls, and bespoke storage) with precise dimensions and material call-outs.



Compliance Oversight: Ensure all designs align with the National Construction Code (NCC/BCA) and AS1428.1 (Accessibility) standards.



Technical Coordination: Review shop drawings, respond to RFIs (Request for Information), and coordinate with Australian project managers and suppliers.



Visual Storytelling: Prepare professional presentation decks, mood boards, and FF&E schedules using Photoshop, PowerPoint, & Google Slides.



Technical Requirements & Software:



The Essentials:

AutoCAD (Expert): Deep knowledge of Layer Management and Sheet Sets. Speed and accuracy are non-negotiable.

Adobe Creative Suite: High proficiency in Photoshop (rendering/collages) and (client presentations/FF&E schedules).

Google Workspace: For internal collaboration and data management.

AI Design Integration: Demonstrated ability to use AI tools (ChatGPT, Gemini, Midjourney) to streamline workflows or generate concept narratives.

Hand Sketching: Ability to communicate design intent through quick digital or hand sketches.



Desirable:

SketchUp: For rapid 3D massing and concept visualization.

Revit: Experience in a BIM environment is a advantage.

InDesign: Familiarisation is beneficial.



Remote & Contract Requirements:

Software Licensing: As a contractor, you are required to hold and maintain your own valid, legal professional licenses for all essential software (AutoCAD, Adobe Creative Suite, etc.) required to perform the role.

Hardware: A high-specification PC/Laptop capable of handling large AutoCAD files and 3D rendering.

Connectivity: Reliable high-speed fiber internet connection (minimum 50Mbps) with a documented backup power/internet solution.

Communication: Exceptional verbal and written English for real-time collaboration with the Sydney team.



Qualifications: 

Experience: Minimum 8+ years in Commercial Interior Design (specifically Workplace/Office Fit-outs).

Portfolio: Must showcase office design space planning, full technical drawing sets, detailed joinery, and mood boards from past commercial projects.

Education: Bachelor’s Degree or Diploma in Interior Design or Interior Architecture.



To apply, please send your application to 



JasonL acknowledges the Traditional Custodians of Country. We pay our respects to them and their cultures, and Elders, past, present and future.

description:
Property Webmasters is on the hunt for a talented AI Workflow Specialist to join our dynamic team and assist our marketing and operational efforts. If you are ready to dive deep into automation, AI tools, and data driven systems and you have an eye for future development, we want to hear from you.



About Property Webmasters



Property Webmasters is a leading provider of cutting edge web solutions for the real estate industry. We empower businesses to thrive online through exceptional design, robust functionality, and strategic digital marketing. As we continue to grow, our commitment to leveraging technology and AI for maximum impact becomes even more critical.



The Opportunity



This is more than just a job. It is a chance to be a pivotal player in our ongoing success. You will work closely with our Head of Marketing and wider teams, taking the lead on designing, implementing, and optimizing AI powered workflows across the business.



Your expertise will be crucial in streamlining processes, enhancing customer journeys, and unlocking new efficiencies through automation and AI. We are not just looking for someone to maintain systems. We are looking for someone who can help us build what is next.



What You Will Bring to the Table (Required Skills)



AI and Automation Tools

Experience working with AI tools such as ChatGPT, automation platforms, or AI agents to streamline workflows and improve efficiency.



Workflow Design and Optimization

Proven experience designing, implementing, and improving automated workflows across marketing, sales, or operations.



Systems Thinking

Ability to map processes, identify inefficiencies, and implement scalable solutions using AI and automation.



Data Driven Mindset

Comfortable working with data, analytics, and performance metrics to optimize workflows and demonstrate impact.



Strong Communication

Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to explain technical concepts clearly to non technical stakeholders.



Problem Solving

A proactive problem solver who can identify bottlenecks and implement smart, efficient solutions.



What We Are Looking For in Future Proofing Potential (Desirable and Developable Skills)



Integration Experience

Experience with or strong interest in integrating tools and platforms such as APIs, Zapier or Make, CRM systems, and marketing tools.



AI Innovation Mindset

Curiosity and excitement around emerging AI technologies and how they can be applied within a business environment.



Basic Technical Knowledge

Understanding of APIs, webhooks, or basic scripting or a strong willingness to learn.



Project Management

Ability to manage multiple workflows, prioritize effectively, and deliver in a fast paced environment.



Proactive and Innovative Thinker

You do not just execute. You identify opportunities, suggest improvements, and continuously refine systems.



Learning Agility

Quick to learn new tools, technologies, and approaches as AI continues to evolve.



Why Join Property Webmasters



Impactful Work

Your work will directly improve efficiency, scalability, and innovation across the business.



Collaborative Environment

Work alongside a supportive and forward thinking team passionate about growth and technology.



Professional Growth

We invest in our people, with opportunities to explore cutting edge AI tools and advance your career.



Competitive Salary and Benefits

We offer a competitive package based on experience.



If you are passionate about AI, automation, and building smarter systems and want to make a real impact in a forward thinking company, we would love to hear from you.

title: Customer, Lead Response & Appointment Scheduling
description:
Role Overview: 

The primary focus of this role is responding quickly to incoming leads, contacting the prospect, and booking appointments. This Virtual Assistant will monitor incoming leads, immediately call prospects, answer basic service questions, and guide them toward scheduling an estimate or service appointment. The ideal candidate is excellent on the phone, organized with CRM systems, and comfortable managing customer conversations while scheduling appointments efficiently.



Primary Responsibilities

1. Lead Response & Appointment Booking (Top Priority)

* Receive incoming leads from platforms such as:

 - Angi

 - Thumbtack

 - Google Local Services Ads (LSA)

 - Website inquiries

 - Social media inquiries

* Respond to new leads quickly to ensure fast engagement

* Call prospects to introduce the company and understand their service needs

* Answer basic service questions and handle high-level pricing conversations when appropriate

* Guide prospects toward booking:

 - In-person estimates

 - Service appointments

 - Estimates that may include same-day service if approved

* Enter and manage lead details in the CRM

* Ensure every lead receives prompt and professional follow-up

The primary goal is turning inbound leads into scheduled appointments.



2. Customer Communication & Appointment Management

* Schedule new appointments for estimates or services

* Send appointment confirmations via phone, text, or

* Follow up with customers prior to scheduled appointments

* Re-book or reschedule appointments when necessary

* Conduct post-appointment follow-ups when appropriate

* Maintain professional and friendly communication with all prospects and customers



3. CRM Management

* Manage customer records and opportunities within the CRM

* Update lead status and appointment details

* Track communications and follow-ups

* Maintain accurate and organized records

The primary CRM used is Workiz, so experience with Workiz is highly preferred. However, candidates with experience using other CRM platforms are also encouraged to apply.



Tools & Systems:

Preferred experience with:

* Workiz CRM (ideal)

* Other CRM systems (HubSpot, Jobber, ServiceTitan, Salesforce, etc.)

* Phone and SMS communication systems

* Google Workspace or Microsoft Office

* Appointment scheduling tools



Ideal Candidate Profile:

The ideal candidate will be:

* Excellent on the phone with strong communication skills

* Comfortable engaging new leads and guiding conversations toward booking

* Highly responsive and organized

* Experienced with CRM systems

* Able to manage multiple leads and follow-ups efficiently

* Professional, friendly, and customer-service oriented

* Experience supporting home services companies (cleaning, restoration, plumbing, HVAC, etc.) is a strong advantage.





To fast track your application, please submit the following information:

Resume: A link to your Google Drive. Please ensure the sharing setting is set to "Anyone with the link."



IMPORTANT REMINDER: To advance in the screening process, you must submit the Podio Form. Timely completion is essential to guarantee your application receives prompt attention.



Podio Form Link: 
/webforms/
/

title: Marketing & Customer Experience Virtual Assistant
description:
We are seeking a proactive, organized, and customer-focused Virtual Assistant to support both digital marketing presence and customer follow-up systems. This role blends social media management, reputation oversight, and digital content creation with customer outreach, follow-up calls, and referral support. The ideal candidate is both creative and structured — someone who can grow the brand online while ensuring no customer falls through the cracks. * Assist with invitations, tracking, and follow-up communication



6. Administrative & Systems Support

* Assist with reporting and basic analytics tracking



Tools & Systems:

 & Instagram Business Tools

Skills & Qualifications

* Strong phone presence and customer communication skills

* Organized and highly detail-oriented

* Comfortable making outbound calls

* Experienced with social media content management

* Self-starter who can manage deadlines independently

* Experience in home services (plumbing/HVAC) a plus

* ServiceTitan experience a strong bonus



To fast track your application, please submit the following information:

Resume: A link to your Google Drive. Please ensure the sharing setting is set to "Anyone with the link."

title: Paint by Numbers Content Creator (Female) (Mini kits)
description:
Join Our Creative Team: Paint & Film Our Mini Kits Set!



We’re looking for someone who enjoys painting and can film the process (hands + painting only, no face needed). You’ll receive our Paint by Numbers Mini Kits Set (6 mini kits per set) for free, and for every completed set of paintings + video content you send us, you’ll receive $20 USD as payment.



What You’ll Do:

Paint our Mini Kits Set: We will ship the set of 6 mini kits to you at no cost.



Film the process: Unboxing the set, painting progress on the various designs, and the final reveals.



Send us the raw video content: We’ll handle the editing.



What You Get:

The Mini Kits Set for free: A collection of 6 designs to enjoy.



$20 USD per completed set once you send the content.



A fun, relaxing activity while earning income.



Requirements:

No need to show your face — only hands and painting.



Must have a phone stand/tripod for stable filming.



Must have an easel to hold the mini canvases while painting.



Must have good daylight lighting so the painting is clear.



Able to deliver clear, good-quality video (phone camera is fine).



Reliable and responsive in communication.



How to Apply:

Please send:



A short introduction about yourself.



A quick sample clip (can be just your hands painting or drawing) so we can check filming quality.

title: Senior Full Stack Developer - 10+ years of experience
description:
We're looking for a Senior Full Stack Developer who's passionate about building exceptional web applications and solving real-world problems for growing businesses. This is your chance to be part of a fast-moving team that values technical excellence, collaboration, and making an impact.



If you're highly skilled in React, Next.js, Nest.js, and Node.js, hold an AWS certification, and are comfortable working US business hours, we'd love to meet you.



Key Responsibilities



Lead the design, development, and deployment of high-performance web applications on AWS infrastructure.

Work across the stack using React, Next.js, Nest.js, and Node.js to build scalable, maintainable features.

Collaborate with product managers, designers, and fellow engineers to ship high-quality solutions.

Own development cycles from concept to deployment—including testing, documentation, and performance optimization.

Implement and maintain robust, well-tested APIs and backend services.

Contribute to architectural decisions and help mentor junior developers as needed.



Requirements



Minimum of 10+ years of hands-on experience as a Full Stack Developer.

Active AWS Certification required (Cloud Practitioner or any foundational-level certification at minimum). Candidates are expected to pursue Associate or Professional-level certifications after joining.

Hands-on experience with AWS services (e.g., Lambda, S3, API Gateway, EC2) in production environments.

Expertise with React, Next.js, Nest.js, and Node.js in production environments.

Proficiency with REST APIs, modern JavaScript/TypeScript, and async programming.

Strong experience with Git and collaborative workflows (e.g., GitHub, GitLab).

Excellent debugging, optimization, and problem-solving skills.

Clear written and verbal communication.

Availability to work full-time during US business hours.



Preferred Qualifications



AWS Associate or Professional-level certification (Solutions Architect, Developer, or DevOps Engineer).

Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines, DevOps practices, and infrastructure as code.

Experience with serverless architectures and performance-focused applications.



What We Offer



Competitive compensation (DOE).

Flexible, remote-friendly role aligned with US time zones.

Opportunities for continuous learning, mentorship, and career growth—including support for AWS certification advancement.

A supportive, collaborative team culture that values quality and innovation.

The chance to work on meaningful projects that drive real business value.



If you're a seasoned developer ready to take ownership and grow with a team that values your expertise—apply now and let's build something great together.

title: Property Management Customer Service Representative
description:
*KINDLY READ THE JOB DESCRIPTION & THE APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS CAREFULLY.*



The Nabo Group is looking for Customer Service Representatives with Property Management experience for our growing team, who enjoys solving problems, responsible, organized, detail oriented, and reliable to join our fun/hard working team. You must have excellent communication skills.



As a Customer Service Representative, you will play a critical role in fostering positive relationships with our clients and ensuring that their maintenance needs are met effectively and efficiently. Your work will directly impact customer satisfaction and help maintain our reputation for excellence in the maintenance industry.



Duties & Responsibilities:

- Client Communication: Act as the primary point of contact for clients, providing exceptional customer service and ensuring clear and professional communication. Respond to client inquiries via phone,
, and online platforms.

- Maintenance Coordination: Work closely with the maintenance team to schedule, track, and coordinate maintenance services, ensuring timely and accurate completion of tasks.

- Issue Resolution: Address and resolve client complaints or concerns regarding maintenance services in a timely, professional, and empathetic manner.

- Client Scheduling & Follow-Up: Schedule appointments for maintenance services and follow up with clients’ post-service to ensure satisfaction and gather feedback.

- Database Management: Maintain accurate and up-to-date records of client interactions, maintenance schedules, and work orders within the company’s CRM system.

- Problem Solving & Troubleshooting: Provide quick solutions to client issues and coordinate any necessary follow-up or additional service visits.

- Collaboration: Work closely with field technicians, supervisors, and other tea
mbers to ensure the smooth flow of maintenance services from start to finish.

- Service Knowledge: Stay informed about the company’s maintenance offerings and ensure clients are fully aware of the services available to them.

- Reporting & Documentation: Document client interactions, service requests, and resolutions. Generate reports to track the progress and outcomes of maintenance activities.

- Performs other duties that may be assigned from time to time.



Desired Qualifications:

- College degree or equivalent work experience.

- Experience with Real Estate is a plus.

- At least 6 months of experience working remotely.

- Excellent English communication skills (spoken and written).

- Excellent interpersonal skills, problem solving, and analytical skills.

- Strong customer service skills.

- Ability to multi-task and prioritize.

- Reliable and dependable.

- Excellent problem-solving skills.

- Ability to remain calm under pressure.

- Attention to details and highly organized.

- Great time management skills.

- Capable of keeping control of the call even when the customer is angry.

- Ethical and trustworthy.

- Great at relationship-building.

- Ability to work under minimal supervision.

- Friendly and fair.



Working conditions:

- Candidate must be able to work in US Time Zone

- Comfortable working with Hubstaff.

- The schedules are permanent and assigned by the department’s Manager. Schedules might change eventually depending on demand.

- Must have own work equipment that is not older than 2 years.

- Work equipment must be personal and not a family or shared computer/laptop.

- Internet speed must be no lower than 150 Mbps.

- Must have backup internet for emergencies (no lower than 100 Mbps) and a place to relocate during power or internet outages.



Compensation & Benefits:

- $6 USD per hour.

- PTO after 90 days of probationary period.

- HMO allowance after 90 days of probationary period.



How to apply:

1. Send an
 attachment with your updated resume in PDF format.

2. Please indicate that you're comfortable to start with $6 USD per hour.

3. Please send a link to your video recording introducing yourself & your relevant experience based on the job description.

4. Kindly send your application to 
 the subject line, kindly indicate the position Property Management Customer Service Representative - your name.



Shortlisted applicants will be contacted by
 for interview scheduling.

Looking forward to working with you!

title: Remote Appointment Setter (Performance-Based)
description:

title: Graphic / Brand & Marketing Designer
description:
Graphic Designer (Remote, Ongoing Collaboration)

We are looking for a talented and reliable Graphic Designer to support our brand with a wide range of design projects. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys variety, works efficiently, and can translate ideas into clean, professional visuals.

You will help create and maintain a consistent visual style across all marketing channels while producing high-quality assets for campaigns, advertising, and digital platforms.



A portfolio is mandatory. And we would love you to show us two examples from your portfolio that demonstrate your ability to design marketing creatives that convert (ads, banners, landing visuals). Explain briefly why they are effective.



About James

James is a trusted Dutch brand with nearly 100 years of experience in cleaning and maintenance solutions for interiors. We develop high-quality products and expert advice for removing stains and caring for floors, carpets, rugs, and upholstery. Our customers include homeowners who want to keep their interiors beautiful, as well as retailers, flooring professionals, and manufacturers who rely on our expertise and recommendations.

Responsibilities



Create high-quality graphic assets for marketing and advertising Design materials such as:



- Campaign banners

- Social media ad creatives

- Social media posts

- Website banners and visuals

-
 marketing graphics

- Display ads and HTML5 banners

- Flyers and brochures





Skills:

- Develop visuals that are consistent with our brand identity

- Translate marketing ideas into clear and engaging visual communication

- Prepare designs that are optimized for both digital and print use. But mainly digital.

- Work closely with the marketing team to deliver assets on time

- Maintain consistency in typography, colors, and overall brand appearance

- Generating AI images



Required Skills & Qualifications



Strong experience with:



- Adobe Illustrator

- Adobe Photoshop

- Canva



Strong understanding of:

- Layout and composition

- Typography

- Color usage

- Visual hierarchy



Ability to work independently and manage multiple projects

Strong attention to detail and brand consistency

Reliable communication and ability to meet deadlines

Experience designing assets for digital marketing campaigns



Nice to Have

- Experience with HTML5 banner design

- Experience with branding and visual identity systems

- Experience creating social media ad creatives

title: Head of Finance & Accounting
description:
Location: Remote (Philippines) – Must work U.S. hours



About Us



WA DeHart Inc., a U.S.-based wholesale distribution company headquartered in Pennsylvania, has been in business for over 100 years. With new leadership, capital, and technology, we are transforming into a tech-driven, growth-focused distribution platform serving convenience stores, gas stations, and smoke shops across the U.S.



Our industry is low-margin, high-volume, and heavily regulated, requiring precision, compliance, and operational discipline to succeed.



Role Overview



We are seeking an experienced Head of Finance & Accounting to oversee all accounting operations, compliance, and financial strategy for our growing organization.



This is a hands-on executive leadership role for a detail-oriented professional who can build scalable financial systems, maintain strict regulatory compliance, and partner with leadership on growth initiatives including cost optimization, capital raises, and acquisitions.



Key Responsibilities



Oversee all accounting operations across multiple entities, ensuring accuracy, transparency, and compliance



Develop and maintain strong financial controls, policies, and scalable accounting systems



Manage monthly, quarterly, and annual close processes, including preparation of financial statements and reports



Lead accounting, financial reporting, and compliance across U.S. operations, ensuring adherence to U.S. and Pennsylvania regulations; experience with FDA regulations, tobacco compliance, and PAC compliance is a strong asset



File required monthly reports with the Pennsylvania Department of Revenue and manage regulatory filings and audits



Partner with external auditors, CPAs, and accounting firms to produce reviewed or audited financial statements



Manage bank and lender relationships, including reporting requirements and loan covenant compliance



Support executive leadership with capital raises, investor reporting, and KPI monitoring



Lead budgeting, forecasting, cash flow management, and financial planning



Drive cost-cutting initiatives and operational efficiency, including vendor contract review, renegotiation of terms, and identifying savings opportunities



Represent the company in audits, tax reviews, and accounting disputes



Mentor and develop a small team of accountants/bookkeepers



Provide financial insights that support organic growth and potential acquisitions



Continuously improve the efficiency, scalability, and accuracy of financial operations



Perform other finance and accounting responsibilities as needed to support strategic, operational, and compliance objectives



Qualifications



10+ years of progressive experience in finance and accounting leadership roles



CPA, CA, or equivalent professional designation strongly preferred



Strong knowledge of financial reporting, regulatory compliance, and accounting controls



Experience managing vendor relationships, cost optimization initiatives, and financial efficiency projects



Experience working with banks, lenders, and financial institutions, including loan covenant compliance



Experience supporting capital raises, investor reporting, or financing activities



Strong business acumen with the ability to think like an owner



Highly detail-oriented, process-driven, and capable of building scalable financial systems



Experience leading and mentoring accounting teams



Preferred Experience



Experience managing multi-entity accounting environments



Experience in wholesale distribution, FMCG, or similar industries



What We Offer



Competitive compensation



Executive leadership role with direct impact on company growth



Opportunity to work closely with ownership and executive leadership



Career growth as the company expands into multiple locations



Long-term opportunities for growth within a scaling U.S. organization



Application Requirement



Please include a short voice or video recording briefly introducing yourself when submitting your application. Applications without a recording will not be considered.

title: Marketing Manager
description:

This is a full-time, exclusive role.

We ask that you do not have other contracts during the work hours for this position,



We will use time tracking tools, as we have had many take advantage of us



This role is not micromanaged — we are seeking someone who can self-manage, take initiative, and take ownership.



Role Overview



We are a U.S.-based self-storage company seeking a Marketing Manager to fully own and lead all SEO and digital marketing efforts for 15 self-storage properties, plus any current and future client accounts (we currently have 2 with one coming on board in about 2 weeks).



You will be responsible for planning, executing, tracking, and improving all marketing efforts across our portfolio. You will work directly with the VP of Operations and may work independently or with one part-time tea
mber. We are seeking someone who specializes in marketing, just just a hobby with at least 1 full year of proven history who can manage the contact calendar and the marketing team. You must be available to communicate and respond to the Partners and Clients. Must track and meet deadlines and content calendar. Ability to accept feedback and pivot it crucial. The abiliity to pivot to clients needs by managing technical SEO and storytelling is essential. The use of AI only will not work - as we need someone who can realize the grammatical and key word issues in a content. 



This is a leadership role. You will be accountable for the success or failure of our marketing efforts.



Your work directly impacts:



Lead volume



Rentals



Business growth



It also helps our Philippine-based property management team earn rental bonuses, which support their families and financial needs. This role has real, meaningful impact.



Key Responsibilities

SEO Strategy & Execution (Primary Focus)



Own and execute the complete SEO strategy for 15 self-storage locations



Perform all on-page SEO:



Title tags, meta descriptions, headers



Internal linking



Location, service, and landing pages



Manage off-page SEO:



Backlink strategy



Citations and directory management



Implement and maintain schema markup:



LocalBusiness



FAQ



Review and related schema



Conduct keyword research for:



Self storage



RV storage



Parking and local search terms



Monitor rankings, traffic, and conversions and continuously optimize



Content Creation



Write and optimize:



SEO blog posts



Location pages



Landing pages



FAQs



Maintain and execute a content calendar



Update and improve existing content based on performance data



Google Business Profile (GBP) Management



Fully manage and optimize GBPs for all locations:



Descriptions, services, posts, photos



Review responses and reputation management



Improve local pack rankings and engagement



Post consistently and strategically



Social Media Management



Plan, create, and schedule content across social platforms



Maintain brand consistency across all locations



Support promotions, seasonal campaigns, and local visibility



Track engagement and performance metrics



Planning, Reporting & Tools



Create and manage monthly SEO and marketing plans



Use Google tools (Search Console, GA4, GBP) for decision-making



Use Ubersuggest and other SEO tools where helpful



Report on:



Leads



Conversions



Performance trends



Identify opportunities and problems proactively — do not wait to be told



Requirements



Proven experience in SEO and digital marketing



Strong understanding of:



Local SEO



On-page and off-page SEO



Schema markup



Google Business Profiles



Content writing and optimization experience



Experience managing multiple locations or accounts



Comfortable self-managing with minimal supervision



Able to take ownership and lead



Comfortable using time-tracking software



Self-storage or real estate experience is a strong plus, but not required.



Our Culture



You will be treated with respect, care, and as a real person — not just a worker.



In return, we ask for:



Honesty



Dependability



Accountability



If something is wrong, we expect transparency. If something can be improved, we expect initiative.



Compensation





Paid twice a month



Long-term opportunity with growth potential based on performance



How to Apply (Required)



Confirmation that you are available full time only during US work hours and agree to no other contracts during our work hours and use of a time tracker - please send resume and portfolio for quickest review.

title: SHORT-FORM VIDEO EDITOR (REELS, SHORTS, TIKTOK)
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

We are seeking talented short-form video editors to join our team on a part-time, weekly basis. In this role, you will transform talking-head and story-based content into engaging, scroll-stopping reels (30–90 seconds) for platforms such as Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and
.

We work with a wide range of clients, including leading companies, social influencers, and not-for-profit organizations.

This is a long-term opportunity for reliable editors looking for consistent, flexible work.



WORK SCHEDULE & SETUP

• Work 1 full day per week (you will choose a preferred day, which will be fixed, but can be adjusted upon request)

 • You will receive 3-5 videos per workday (batch)

 • Raw footage will be provided 1–2 days in advance

 • Draft delivery required within the same day or agreed timeframe

 • Revisions (if needed) handled promptly



WHAT YOU’LL DO

• Transform raw footage into polished short-form reels by:

 • Cutting filler words, pauses, and mistakes for smooth flow

 • Adding relevant b-roll, images, or stock footage where needed

 • Creating clean, auto-generated captions with consistent styling

 • Using engaging cuts, transitions, and pacing to improve retention

 • Applying basic color correction and audio enhancement

 • Delivering ready-to-post reels via Google Drive



WORKFLOW

• Raw footage shared via Google Drive

 • Communication via WhatsApp / Google Docs/ Trello

 • Ongoing weekly collaboration



WHAT MAKES YOU A GOOD FIT

• Experience editing short-form content (Reels, TikTok, Shorts)

 • Fluent in English

 • Proficiency in CapCut or Adobe Premiere Pro

 • Ability to source b-roll, images, or simple graphics

 • Understanding of social media trends and viewer retention



COMPENSATION

• $10 per reel

 • Typical output: 3 reels per workday = $30 per day

 • Consistent weekly work with potential to increase volume over time



WHY WORK WITH US?

 • Long-term, reliable opportunity

 • Clear expectations and streamlined workflow

 • Opportunity to grow with a fast-scaling content team



HOW TO APPLY

IMPORTANT: We use a Google Form to streamline applications. Please DO NOT send your CV.

>>>>APPLICATION FORM: 



READY TO EDIT WITH US?

We’d love to see your work.

Apply now and show us your skills through our test project.

 • Run performance reviews with the client team, assess progress, and work with the 
 founder to adjust strategy as needed.

 • Work closely with our founder on non-client-facing founder priorities: process upgrades, internal projects, and playbook refinements.

 • Keep implementation projects organized, including timelines, deliverables, handoffs, and documentation.

 • Coordinate meetings, reporting, and other lightweight activities that keep delivery running smoothly.



We’re Looking For Someone Who Has:

 • Four-plus years of outbound B2B sales management experience, as a leader or coach.

 • Strong operational discipline: you like metrics, routines, and making performance visible.

 • Confidence running multiple workstreams without dropping details.

 • A founder-friendly mindset: proactive, structured, reliable, and comfortable with fast shifts.

 

This is a full-time, remote role. Your work hours will need to overlap with 9am to 4pm US Eastern Time. 

We rely heavily on Apple devices, applications, and services. You should have a post-2021 Mac for this job.

title: Senior EU Product Compliance specialist
description:
At Instrux, we help companies bring products to market in the right way. We support clients with EU product compliance by translating regulations into practical actions, reviewing technical documentation, and helping them make sound compliance decisions. Our projects range from straightforward documentation support to more complex compliance challenges that require research, interpretation, and client advice.



We are looking for a Senior EU Product Compliance Specialist who can take ownership of projects, perform regulatory research, and advise clients with confidence. This role is for someone who is comfortable working independently, communicating directly with clients, and turning complex requirements into clear recommendations.



What you will do



- Lead EU product compliance projects from review to recommendation

- Research applicable EU legislation, standards, and product requirements

- Review technical documentation and identify compliance gaps or risks

- Draft risk assessments according to ISO 12100 or GPSR guidelines

- Advise clients on documentation, conformity requirements, and next steps

- Draft or review Declarations of Conformity and technical files where needed

- Communicate with clients, suppliers, and other stakeholders to move projects forward

- Translate complex compliance topics into practical and understandable advice

- Support internal knowledge building and contribute to strong project delivery



What we are looking for



- Solid experience in EU product compliance, mainly CE/GPSR/FCM/REACH (3 -5 years day to day experience)

- Strong research and analytical skills

- Confident in reviewing regulations and applying them to real products and situations

- Able to manage projects independently and keep 
ntum

- Clear and professional written and spoken English

- Strong communication skills with clients and suppliers

- Detail-oriented, practical, and solution-focused

- Comfortable working fully remote

title: Junior EU Product Compliance specialist
description:
At Instrux, we help companies bring products to market in the right way. That means helping the
et EU product rules, organize the right documents, and make sure everything is in place before a product is sold. We work with both growing companies and established manufacturers, and we turn complex compliance requirements into practical steps.



We are looking for a Junior EU Product Compliance Specialist to support our compliance team. This is a detail-focused role for someone who likes structured work, clear documentation, and professional communication with clients and suppliers.



What you will do



- Draft Declarations of Conformity based on existing information and templates

- Build and organize technical files and product documentation

- Review new customer documents and check whether required information is complete

- Follow up with suppliers and clients to request missing documents or clarifications

- Help maintain clear and well-structured compliance records

- Support senior specialists with project preparation and document handling

- Flag missing information, inconsistencies, or risks in product files





What we are looking for



- Minimal 1 year experience in a position where CE/GPSR was part of the daily operations.

- Strong attention to detail

- Good written English and clear communication

- Comfortable working with documents, lists, and structured processes

- Able to follow instructions carefully and ask questions when something is unclear

- Professional in communication with clients and suppliers

- Interested in EU product compliance, documentation, and regulations

- Able to work independently in a remote environment



Nice to have



- Experience with product documentation, technical files, or quality/compliance work

- Experience working with suppliers or document collection

- Familiarity with CE marking or EU product legislation



Why this role is interesting



This is a great opportunity for someone who wants to build a career in EU compliance. You will learn how product compliance works in real client projects, how technical files are structured, and how to support companies that need to meet EU requirements before selling their products.

title: SEO Specialist
description:
About ILX Travel 



ILX Travel is a premier luxury travel concierge company dedicated to designing bespoke travel experiences—resorts, private villas, yacht charters, cultural journeys, cruises, and wellness retreats. As a Virtuoso affiliate, ILX provides exclusive privileges, amenities, and insider access. 



Mission: 

To design extraordinary, personalized travel experiences that enrich our clients’ lives through discovery, comfort, and authentic connection—delivered with exceptional service, expertise, and care. 



Vision: 

To become the most trusted luxury travel partner for discerning travelers seeking curated journeys, exclusive access, and seamless service. 



Values: 

Excellence • Integrity • Creativity • Client?Centered Service • Collaboration • Innovation • Continuous Improvement



Role Objective: 

We are seeking an experienced SEO Specialist who understands modern search beyond traditional SEO—someone who can drive visibility across search engines and AI-driven discovery platforms. This role requires a strategic thinker with hands-on execution skills in geo-targeted, destination-driven SEO, and a strong understanding of how travelers search, plan, and book experiences online. 



Key Responsibilities:

I. SEO Strategy & Execution 

-Develop and execute scalable SEO strategies aligned with business and revenue goals  

-Identify and prioritize high-intent, transactional, and destination-based keywords  

-Align SEO efforts with luxury travel buyer behavior and seasonal demand trends  



II. Modern & AI-Driven SEO 

-Leverage AI tools to accelerate keyword research, content optimization, and insights  

-Optimize for entity-based, semantic, and AI-assisted search (AEO)  

-Ensure visibility across Google, Bing, and emerging AI-driven platforms  



III. On-Page & Technical SEO 

-Optimize site architecture, internal linking, metadata, and structured data (Schema)  

-Collaborate with developers on technical SEO implementation  

-Improve crawlability, indexation, and overall site health  



IV. Geo & Programmatic SEO 

-Build and scale high-quality, location-based landing pages  

-Ensure geo pages provide real value and avoid thin or duplicate content  

-Apply best practices for multi-destination and international SEO  



V. Measurement & Continuous Optimization 

-Track performance using tools like Google Search Console, GA4, Ahrefs, or SEMrush  

-Analyze traffic quality, rankings, and conversion performance  

-Continuously refine strategies using a Kaizen (continuous improvement) approach 



Required Skills & Experience:

-3+ years of SEO experience (mid to advanced level)  

-Strong expertise in geo-targeted SEO and entity-based search optimization  

-Proven experience in travel, hospitality, or luxury lifestyle industries (required)  

-Strong geographic knowledge of global destinations, regions, and travel trends (required)  

-Hands-on experience with SEO tools (Google Search Console, Bing Webmaster Tools, Ahrefs, SEMrush, etc.)  

-Familiarity with AI tools and workflows for SEO and content optimization  

-Understanding of search intent across the travel customer journey  



Preferred Qualifications:

-Experience working with luxury travel brands or high-end clientele  

-Knowledge of programmatic SEO and scalable content strategies  

-Familiarity with conversion-focused SEO and CRO principles  



Interested applicants are encouraged to apply via the following link:


/4rYl61U



Please note that only applications submitted through this link will be entertained.

title: Mortgage Transaction & Client Communication Specialist
description:
We are seeking a highly organized and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant with mortgage industry experience to support the loan transaction process and client communications.



The primary focus of this role is to help ensure loans move smoothly once they enter underwriting, by coordinating communication between the borrower, lender processors, and third-party vendors such as title companies and homeowners insurance providers.



This person will serve as a communication hub during the transaction process, helping keep files organized, conditions addressed, and clients informed throughout the process.



We are looking for someone who is excellent with communication, highly organized, and experienced in mortgage operations.



Key Responsibilities:



1. Transaction Coordination

* Assist with managing loan files once they enter underwriting

* Communicate regularly with lender processors regarding loan status and conditions

* Monitor underwriting conditions and help ensure required documentation is collected

* Track key milestones to keep transactions moving efficiently toward closing



2. Client Communication:

* Follow up with borrowers throughout the loan process

* Provide updates on loan progress and underwriting status

* Help guide borrowers through documentation requests

* Maintain a smooth, professional experience for clients during the mortgage process



3. Vendor Coordination:

* Communicate with third-party vendors including:

- Title companies

- Homeowners insurance providers

- Other closing-related vendors

* Ensure all documentation needed for closing is received and submitted on time



4. File & Process Management

* Maintain organized digital loan files

* Track outstanding conditions and documentation

* Update notes and status updates in loan systems or internal platforms



5. CRM & Light Marketing Support (Nice to Have)

* Maintain basic updates in the company CRM

* Assist with organizing contacts and borrower communication notes

* Support simple automation workflows if applicable

* Experience with GoHighLevel (GHL) is a plus but not required



Required Qualifications:

* 2+ years experience working in a mortgage company

* Strong understanding of the mortgage loan process from application through closing

* Experience communicating with borrowers, processors, and vendors

* Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

* Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

* Ability to manage multiple loan files simultaneously



Preferred (Nice to Have):

* Experience with loan origination systems (LOS) such as Encompass, Calyx, or similar

* Previous experience as a loan processor, loan officer assistant, or transaction coordinator

* Familiarity with CRM platforms

* Experience with GoHighLevel (GHL) or similar marketing CRM tools



Ideal Candidate Traits:

* Professional and confident communicator

* Highly organized and detail-oriented

* Proactive and solution-oriented

* Comfortable managing multiple moving pieces

* Client-focused with strong follow-up habits





To fast track your application, please submit the following information:

Resume: A link to your Google Drive. Please ensure the sharing setting is set to "Anyone with the link."



IMPORTANT REMINDER: To advance in the screening process, you must submit the Podio Form. Timely completion is essential to guarantee your application receives prompt attention.

To be considered, please submit your resume, a portfolio with prior work, references if available, and an introduction video. For a higher chance of selection, include a screen recording that introduces you while you walk through your YouTube process. Must use at least 8 apply points. Correspond only via OLJ platform.

title: Full-Time Video Editor for a Supplement Brand
description:
About Us

We are a fast-growing health and wellness brand obsessed with customer psychology and creative excellence. We don't just "make content," we build high-performance assets that drive millions in revenue. We are looking for a Video Editor who is genuinely passionate about performance, speed, and continuous improvement.



This is not a role for someone who just wants to follow a storyboard and clock out. We need a creative who looks at a hook and immediately thinks of three ways to make it more engaging, faster, and higher-converting.



Our philosophy: we prioritize 10 ads at 80% quality over 2 ads at 100%. Speed and volume win in performance marketing. If you're someone who obsesses over pixel-perfect polish at the expense of output, this isn't the right fit.



The Role

You will own the creation of high-volume, high-performance video ads, targeting 10–20 videos per week depending on length. This includes short-form for Meta/TikTok, long-form VSLs, AI avatars, B-roll edits, and voiceover-driven content.



You'll work from creative briefs and scripts provided by our creative strategists and copywriters, turning direction into polished, high-converting assets at speed. You take deep pride in ownership, turn raw footage and AI outputs into systematic creative machines, and ensure our creative output is a competitive advantage.



If you are a builder who thrives on iterating based on data rather than just "vibes," we want to talk to you.



What You Will Do

* Full-Spectrum Production: Create high-converting short-form ads (15–60s), UGC-style content, and long-form VSLs for Meta, TikTok, and YouTube.

* AI Mastery: Take full ownership of our AI tech stack, including Veo 3, HeyGen, Runway, and ElevenLabs for video, and Nano-Banana for statics, to produce high-quality AI video, avatar, and voiceover outputs at scale.

* Source Fresh Creatives: Proactively find and source fresh B-roll and visual assets from across the internet. You never run dry, and you never recycle.



What We're Looking For

Experience & Skills

* 2+ years of video editing experience, with specific experience editing for DTC brands or performance marketing.

* Technical mastery: Fluency in Premiere, Final Cut, or CapCut, plus advanced proficiency in AI video tools (Veo 3, HeyGen, Runway, ElevenLabs, Nano-Banana).

* Strategic thinking: Strong instincts for hooks, pacing, and storytelling in a Direct Response (DR) context.

* Resourcefulness: Proven ability to source fresh creatives, B-roll, and visual assets independently. You always have new material to work with.



Work Style

* Speed over perfection. You can move fast and deliver high volume without sacrificing the quality that matters.

* Implement feedback quickly, often same-day turnaround.

* Improvement-driven: You can demonstrate how you've personally improved a creative's performance through iteration or better editing workflows.

* Excellent English, clear written and verbal communication for seamless collaboration.

* Self-learner. You figure things out on your own. Whether it's a new tool, a new technique, or a new platform, you don't wait to be taught.

* Organized file structures and version control for rapid iteration.



Commitment

Full-time and exclusive. This role requires your full professional focus. We invest heavily in our people, training, tools, growth, and we're looking for someone who's equally invested in building something long-term with us.



Click here to apply : 
/jobs/
video-editor-dtc-ecommerce
